2026-05-04T14:08:34.9677259Z     10. class MetricsEngine(workspaceRoot: Path) : AutoCloseable {
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9677828Z     11.     private val dbPath: Path = sourceIndexDatabasePath(workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9678386Z     12.     private val codec = PathInterningCodec(workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9678803Z     13. 
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9679016Z     14.     @Volatile
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9679336Z     15.     private var cachedConnection: Connection? = null
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9679699Z     16. 
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9679969Z     17.     fun fanInRanking(limit: Int): List<FanInMetric> {
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9680695Z     18.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9681111Z     19.         if (limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9681585Z     20. 
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9681807Z     21.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9682115Z     22.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9693171Z     23.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9693587Z     24.                     SELECT target_name.fq_name,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9694010Z     25.                            target_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9694653Z     26.                            refs.tgt_filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9695059Z     27.                            target_meta.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9695471Z     28.                            target_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9695826Z     29.                            COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9696400Z     30.                            COUNT(DISTINCT refs.src_prefix_id || ':' || refs.src_filename) AS source_file_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9697030Z     31.                            COUNT(DISTINCT source_meta.module_path) AS source_module_count
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9697493Z     32.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9697871Z     33.                     LEFT JOIN file_metadata source_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9698295Z     34.                       ON source_meta.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9698749Z     35.                      AND source_meta.filename = refs.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9699175Z     36.                     LEFT JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9699579Z     37.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9700016Z     38.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9700514Z     39.                     JOIN fq_names target_name ON target_name.fq_id = refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9701204Z     40.                     LEFT JOIN path_prefixes target_prefix ON target_prefix.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9702217Z     41.                     GROUP BY refs.target_fq_id, refs.tgt_prefix_id, refs.tgt_filename, target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9702893Z     42.                      ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9703324Z     43.                               target_name.fq_name ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9703809Z     44.                               COALESCE(target_prefix.dir_path || '/' || refs.tgt_filename, '') ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9704283Z     45.                     LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9704579Z     46.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9704917Z     47.                 fields = FanInField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9705282Z     48.                 bind = { setInt(1, limit) },
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9705616Z     49.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9705909Z     50.                     FanInMetric(
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9706295Z     51.                         targetFqName = string(FanInField.TARGET_FQ_NAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9706895Z     52.                         targetPath = nullablePath(FanInField.TARGET_DIR, FanInField.TARGET_FILENAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9707569Z     53.                         targetModulePath = nullableString(FanInField.TARGET_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9708187Z     54.                         targetSourceSet = nullableString(FanInField.TARGET_SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9708715Z     55.                         occurrenceCount = int(FanInField.OCCURRENCE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9709213Z     56.                         sourceFileCount = int(FanInField.SOURCE_FILE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9709711Z     57.                         sourceModuleCount = int(FanInField.SOURCE_MODULE_COUNT),

2026-05-04T14:08:34.9712170Z     65.     fun fanOutRanking(limit: Int): List<FanOutMetric> {
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9712829Z     66.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9713241Z     67.         if (limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9713453Z     68. 
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9713609Z     69.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9713944Z     70.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9714142Z     71.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9714362Z     72.                     SELECT source_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9714607Z     73.                            refs.src_filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9714849Z     74.                            source_meta.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9715107Z     75.                            source_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9715357Z     76.                            COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9715659Z     77.                            COUNT(DISTINCT refs.target_fq_id) AS target_symbol_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9715970Z     78.                            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9716245Z     79.                                WHEN refs.tgt_prefix_id IS NULL THEN NULL
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9716558Z     80.                                ELSE refs.tgt_prefix_id || ':' || refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9716850Z     81.                            END) AS target_file_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9717170Z     82.                            COUNT(DISTINCT target_meta.module_path) AS target_module_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9717627Z     83.                            SUM(CASE WHEN refs.tgt_prefix_id IS NULL OR target_meta.prefix_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9718008Z     84.                                 AS external_target_count
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9718264Z     85.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9718618Z     86.                     JOIN path_prefixes source_prefix ON source_prefix.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9718974Z     87.                     LEFT JOIN file_metadata source_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9719248Z     88.                       ON source_meta.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9719534Z     89.                      AND source_meta.filename = refs.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9719801Z     90.                     LEFT JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9720069Z     91.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9720341Z     92.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9720733Z     93.                     GROUP BY refs.src_prefix_id, refs.src_filename, source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9721123Z     94.                     ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9721567Z     95.                              source_prefix.dir_path ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9721824Z     96.                              refs.src_filename ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9722047Z     97.                     LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9722249Z     98.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9722478Z     99.                 fields = FanOutField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:08:34.9722721Z     100.                 bind = { setInt(1, limit) },

2026-05-04T14:08:48.2229677Z     70.     private fun readRegistry(registryPath: Path): Map<String, String> {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2230130Z     71.         if (!Files.isRegularFile(registryPath)) {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2230471Z     72.             return emptyMap()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2230735Z     73.         }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2230949Z     74.         return runCatching {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2231653Z     75.             val json = Json.parseToJsonElement(Files.readString(registryPath)) as? JsonObject ?: return emptyMap()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2232243Z     76.             json.mapNotNull { (key, value) ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2232672Z     77.                 value.jsonPrimitive.contentOrNull?.let { id -> key to id }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2233058Z     78.             }.toMap()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2233326Z     79.         }.getOrDefault(emptyMap())
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2233597Z     80.     }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2233784Z     81. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2234151Z     82.     private fun writeRegistry(registryPath: Path, registry: Map<String, String>) {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2234690Z     83.         registryPath.parent?.let(Files::createDirectories)
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2235259Z     84.         val json = JsonObject(registry.toSortedMap().mapValues { (_, value) -> JsonPrimitive(value) })
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2235969Z     85.         Files.writeString(registryPath, Json.encodeToString(JsonObject.serializer(), json))
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2236431Z     86.     }

2026-05-04T14:08:48.2238008Z     91.         .trim('-')
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2238272Z     92.         .ifBlank { "workspace" }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2238566Z     93.         .take(80)

2026-05-04T14:08:48.2767400Z     117.     fun moduleCouplingMatrix(): List<ModuleCouplingMetric> =
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2767677Z     118.         readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2767878Z     119.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2768069Z     120.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2768408Z     121.                     SELECT source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2768908Z     122.                            target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2769346Z     123.                            COUNT(*) AS reference_count
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2769917Z     124.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2770306Z     125.                     JOIN file_metadata source_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2770739Z     126.                       ON source_meta.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2771142Z     127.                      AND source_meta.filename = refs.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2771598Z     128.                     JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2771866Z     129.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2772155Z     130.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2772434Z     131.                     WHERE source_meta.module_path IS NOT NULL
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2772700Z     132.                       AND target_meta.module_path IS NOT NULL
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2772989Z     133.                       AND source_meta.module_path <> target_meta.module_path
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2773438Z     134.                     GROUP BY source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set, target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2773968Z     135.                     ORDER BY reference_count DESC, source_meta.module_path ASC, target_meta.module_path ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2774316Z     136.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2774556Z     137.                 fields = ModuleCouplingField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2774795Z     138.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2775010Z     139.                     ModuleCouplingMetric(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2775342Z     140.                         sourceModulePath = string(ModuleCouplingField.SOURCE_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2775780Z     141.                         sourceSourceSet = nullableString(ModuleCouplingField.SOURCE_SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2776203Z     142.                         targetModulePath = string(ModuleCouplingField.TARGET_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2776615Z     143.                         targetSourceSet = nullableString(ModuleCouplingField.TARGET_SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2777011Z     144.                         referenceCount = int(ModuleCouplingField.REFERENCE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2777295Z     145.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2777471Z     146.                 },
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2777640Z     147.             ),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2777801Z     148.         )

2026-05-04T14:08:48.2778244Z     150.     fun lowUsageSymbols(maxOccurrences: Int = 2, limit: Int = 50): List<LowUsageSymbol> {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2778753Z     151.         require(maxOccurrences >= 0) { "maxOccurrences must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2779096Z     152.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2779392Z     153.         if (maxOccurrences == 0 || limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2779636Z     154. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2779790Z     155.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2779999Z     156.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2780194Z     157.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2780411Z     158.                     SELECT target_name.fq_name,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2780656Z     159.                            target_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2780900Z     160.                            refs.tgt_filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2781494Z     161.                            target_meta.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2781760Z     162.                            COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2782118Z     163.                            COUNT(DISTINCT refs.src_prefix_id || ':' || refs.src_filename) AS source_file_count
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2782469Z     164.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2782768Z     165.                     JOIN fq_names target_name ON target_name.fq_id = refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2783183Z     166.                     JOIN path_prefixes target_prefix ON target_prefix.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2783857Z     167.                     JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2784270Z     168.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2784703Z     169.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2785179Z     170.                     GROUP BY refs.target_fq_id, refs.tgt_prefix_id, refs.tgt_filename, target_meta.module_path
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2785550Z     171.                     HAVING source_file_count = 1
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2785789Z     172.                        AND occurrence_count <= ?
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2786058Z     173.                     ORDER BY COALESCE(target_meta.module_path, '') ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2786343Z     174.                              target_name.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2786564Z     175.                     LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2786770Z     176.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2786993Z     177.                 fields = LowUsageField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2787219Z     178.                 bind = {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2787425Z     179.                     setInt(1, maxOccurrences)
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2787647Z     180.                     setInt(2, limit)
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2787845Z     181.                 },
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2788018Z     182.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2788220Z     183.                     LowUsageSymbol(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2788480Z     184.                         targetFqName = string(LowUsageField.TARGET_FQ_NAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2788893Z     185.                         targetPath = nullablePath(LowUsageField.TARGET_DIR, LowUsageField.TARGET_FILENAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2789344Z     186.                         targetModulePath = nullableString(LowUsageField.TARGET_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2789721Z     187.                         occurrenceCount = int(LowUsageField.OCCURRENCE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2790071Z     188.                         sourceFileCount = int(LowUsageField.SOURCE_FILE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2790350Z     189.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2790527Z     190.                 },
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2790693Z     191.             ),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2790852Z     192.         )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2791000Z     193.     }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2791151Z     194. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2791446Z     195.     fun moduleCycles(): List<ModuleCycleMetric> {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2791720Z     196.         val edgeWeights = moduleCouplingMatrix()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2792047Z     197.             .fold(mutableMapOf<Pair<String, String>, Int>()) { weights, edge ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2792410Z     198.                 val key = edge.sourceModulePath to edge.targetModulePath
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2792754Z     199.                 weights[key] = weights.getOrDefault(key, 0) + edge.referenceCount
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2793032Z     200.                 weights
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2793209Z     201.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2793423Z     202.         val adjacency = buildMap<String, List<String>> {
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2793824Z     203.             val nodes = edgeWeights.keys.flatMap { (source, target) -> listOf(source, target) }.toSortedSet()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2794191Z     204.             nodes.forEach { node ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2794392Z     205.                 put(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2794573Z     206.                     node,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2794892Z     207.                     edgeWeights.keys
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2795139Z     208.                         .filter { (source, _) -> source == node }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2795409Z     209.                         .map { (_, target) -> target }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2795640Z     210.                         .sorted(),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2795836Z     211.                 )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2796006Z     212.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2796161Z     213.         }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2796309Z     214. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2796502Z     215.         return stronglyConnectedComponents(adjacency)
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2796858Z     216.             .filter { it.size > 1 }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2797078Z     217.             .mapNotNull { component ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2797340Z     218.                 shortestCycle(component, adjacency)?.let { cycle ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2797651Z     219.                     val cycleEdges = cycle.zipWithNext()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2797972Z     220.                     val totalReferenceCount = cycleEdges.sumOf { (source, target) ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2798418Z     221.                         checkNotNull(edgeWeights[source to target]) { "Missing module edge $source -> $target" }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2798772Z     222.                     }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2798987Z     223.                     val weakestEdge = cycleEdges.minWith(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2799249Z     224.                         compareBy<Pair<String, String>>(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2799574Z     225.                             { (source, target) -> checkNotNull(edgeWeights[source to target]) },
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2799885Z     226.                             { it.first },
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2800110Z     227.                             { it.second },
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2800326Z     228.                         ),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2800516Z     229.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2800736Z     230.                     ModuleCycleMetric(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2800972Z     231.                         cycle = cycle,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2801359Z     232.                         totalReferenceCount = totalReferenceCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2801912Z     233.                         weakestEdgeSource = weakestEdge.first,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2802484Z     234.                         weakestEdgeTarget = weakestEdge.second,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2803012Z     235.                         weakestEdgeReferenceCount = checkNotNull(edgeWeights[weakestEdge]),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2803481Z     236.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2803758Z     237.                 }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2804002Z     238.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2804308Z     239.             .sortedBy { it.cycle.joinToString(" -> ") }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2804662Z     240.     }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2804874Z     241. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2805178Z     242.     fun moduleDepthMetrics(): List<ModuleDepthMetric> =
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2805542Z     243.         readMetric(emptyList()) { conn ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2805889Z     244.             val declarations = moduleDeclarationStats(conn)
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2806257Z     245.             val references = moduleReferenceStats(conn)
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2806569Z     246. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2806801Z     247.             declarations.values
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2807151Z     248.                 .sortedBy { it.modulePath }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2807508Z     249.                 .map { declaration ->
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2808030Z     250.                     val reference = references[declaration.modulePath] ?: ModuleReferenceStats(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2808612Z     251.                         modulePath = declaration.modulePath,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2809026Z     252.                         internalRefCount = 0,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2809394Z     253.                         externalRefCount = 0,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2809724Z     254.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2810179Z     255.                     val totalRefs = reference.internalRefCount + reference.externalRefCount
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2811124Z     256.                     val cohesionRatio = if (totalRefs == 0) 0.0 else reference.internalRefCount / totalRefs.toDouble()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2812257Z     257.                     val refsPerFile = if (declaration.fileCount == 0) 0.0 else reference.internalRefCount / declaration.fileCount.toDouble()
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2812976Z     258.                     ModuleDepthMetric(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2813370Z     259.                         modulePath = declaration.modulePath,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2813805Z     260.                         fileCount = declaration.fileCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2814482Z     261.                         declaredSymbolCount = declaration.declaredSymbolCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2815058Z     262.                         internalRefCount = reference.internalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2815555Z     263.                         externalRefCount = reference.externalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2816022Z     264.                         cohesionRatio = cohesionRatio,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2816443Z     265.                         refsPerFile = refsPerFile,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2816851Z     266.                         diagnosis = moduleDepthDiagnosis(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2817279Z     267.                             fileCount = declaration.fileCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2817746Z     268.                             internalRefCount = reference.internalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2818257Z     269.                             externalRefCount = reference.externalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2818718Z     270.                             cohesionRatio = cohesionRatio,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2819130Z     271.                             refsPerFile = refsPerFile,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2819486Z     272.                         ),
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2819761Z     273.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2820024Z     274.                 }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2820269Z     275.         }
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2820490Z     276. 
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2820794Z     277.     fun deadCodeCandidates(): List<DeadCodeCandidate> =
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2821184Z     278.         readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2821599Z     279.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2821903Z     280.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2822240Z     281.                     SELECT identifiers.identifier,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2822655Z     282.                            identifier_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2823058Z     283.                            identifiers.filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2823418Z     284.                            metadata.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2823790Z     285.                            metadata.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2824165Z     286.                            package_name.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2824551Z     287.                     FROM identifier_paths identifiers
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2825193Z     288.                     JOIN path_prefixes identifier_prefix ON identifier_prefix.prefix_id = identifiers.prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2825790Z     289.                      LEFT JOIN file_metadata metadata
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2826218Z     290.                        ON metadata.prefix_id = identifiers.prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2826687Z     291.                       AND metadata.filename = identifiers.filename
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2827415Z     292.                      LEFT JOIN fq_names package_name ON package_name.fq_id = metadata.package_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2827921Z     293.                      WHERE NOT EXISTS (
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2828245Z     294.                          SELECT 1
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2828588Z     295.                          FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2829073Z     296.                          JOIN fq_names target_name ON target_name.fq_id = refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2829607Z     297.                          WHERE refs.tgt_prefix_id = identifiers.prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2830069Z     298.                            AND refs.tgt_filename = identifiers.filename
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2830612Z     299.                            AND (
2026-05-04T14:08:48.2830976Z     300.                                target_name.fq_name = identifiers.identifier
2026-05-04T14:08:55.4550446Z

2026-05-04T14:08:55.5747666Z     304.                     ORDER BY COALESCE(metadata.module_path, '') ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5747983Z     305.                              identifier_prefix.dir_path ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5748262Z     306.                              identifiers.filename ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5748538Z     307.                              identifiers.identifier ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5748775Z     308.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5749005Z     309.                 fields = DeadCodeField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5749229Z     310.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5749440Z     311.                     DeadCodeCandidate(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5749703Z     312.                         identifier = string(DeadCodeField.IDENTIFIER),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5750033Z     313.                         path = path(DeadCodeField.DIR, DeadCodeField.FILENAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5750376Z     314.                         modulePath = nullableString(DeadCodeField.MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5750729Z     315.                         sourceSet = nullableString(DeadCodeField.SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5751086Z     316.                         packageName = nullableString(DeadCodeField.PACKAGE_NAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5751634Z     317.                         confidence = MetricsConfidence.LOW,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5752154Z     318.                         reason = "Identifier has no inbound reference rows matching its file and simple name; identifier_paths is lexical, not declaration-only.",
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5752622Z     319.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5752803Z     320.                 },
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5752971Z     321.             ),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5753134Z     322.         )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5753288Z     323. 
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5753429Z     324. 
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5753684Z     325.     fun changeImpactRadius(fqName: String, depth: Int): List<ChangeImpactNode> {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5754046Z     326.         require(depth >= 0) { "depth must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5754315Z     327.         if (depth == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5754551Z     328.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5754756Z     329.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5754950Z     330.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5755294Z     331.                     WITH RECURSIVE impacted_files(depth, src_prefix_id, src_filename, via_target_fq_id) AS (
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5755696Z     332.                         SELECT 1, src_prefix_id, src_filename, target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5755974Z     333.                         FROM symbol_references
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5756428Z     334.                         WHERE target_fq_id = (SELECT fq_id FROM fq_names WHERE fq_name = ?)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5756731Z     335.                         UNION
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5756961Z     336.                         SELECT impacted_files.depth + 1,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5757222Z     337.                                refs.src_prefix_id,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5757465Z     338.                                refs.src_filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5757705Z     339.                                refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5757939Z     340.                         FROM impacted_files
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5758182Z     341.                         JOIN symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5758620Z     342.                           ON refs.tgt_prefix_id = impacted_files.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5758941Z     343.                          AND refs.tgt_filename = impacted_files.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5759231Z     344.                         WHERE impacted_files.depth < ?
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5759462Z     345.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5759686Z     346.                     first_hits AS (
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5760066Z     347.                         SELECT src_prefix_id, src_filename, MIN(depth) AS depth
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5760677Z     348.                         FROM impacted_files
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5761453Z     349.                         GROUP BY src_prefix_id, src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5762027Z     350.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5762578Z     351.                     SELECT source_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5763147Z     352.                            first_hits.src_filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5763613Z     353.                            first_hits.depth,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5764134Z     354.                            via_target_name.fq_name,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5764700Z     355.                            COUNT(refs.source_offset) AS reference_count
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5765299Z     356.                     FROM first_hits
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5765730Z     357.                     JOIN impacted_files
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5766278Z     358.                       ON impacted_files.src_prefix_id = first_hits.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5766966Z     359.                      AND impacted_files.src_filename = first_hits.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5767617Z     360.                      AND impacted_files.depth = first_hits.depth
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5768258Z     361.                      JOIN symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5768903Z     362.                        ON refs.src_prefix_id = impacted_files.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5769595Z     363.                       AND refs.src_filename = impacted_files.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5770353Z     364.                       AND refs.target_fq_id = impacted_files.via_target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5771428Z     365.                     JOIN fq_names via_target_name ON via_target_name.fq_id = impacted_files.via_target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5772382Z     366.                      JOIN path_prefixes source_prefix ON source_prefix.prefix_id = first_hits.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5773176Z     367.                     GROUP BY first_hits.src_prefix_id,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5773731Z     368.                              first_hits.src_filename,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5774218Z     369.                              first_hits.depth,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5774740Z     370.                               impacted_files.via_target_fq_id,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5775208Z     371.                               via_target_name.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5775648Z     372.                     ORDER BY first_hits.depth ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5776191Z     373.                               reference_count DESC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5776717Z     374.                               source_prefix.dir_path ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5777250Z     375.                               first_hits.src_filename ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5777825Z     376.                               via_target_name.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5778556Z     377.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5778996Z     378.                 fields = ChangeImpactField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5779414Z     379.                 bind = {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5779792Z     380.                     setString(1, fqName)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5780169Z     381.                     setInt(2, depth)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5780478Z     382.                 },
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5780760Z     383.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5781121Z     384.                     ChangeImpactNode(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5781845Z     385.                         sourcePath = path(ChangeImpactField.SOURCE_DIR, ChangeImpactField.SOURCE_FILENAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5782704Z     386.                         depth = int(ChangeImpactField.DEPTH),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5783292Z     387.                         viaTargetFqName = string(ChangeImpactField.VIA_TARGET_FQ_NAME),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5783997Z     388.                         occurrenceCount = int(ChangeImpactField.OCCURRENCE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5784596Z     389.                         semantics = ImpactSemantics.FILE_LEVEL_APPROXIMATION,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5785036Z     390.                     )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5785297Z     391.                 },
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5785549Z     392.             ),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5785823Z     393.         )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5786146Z     394.     }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5786399Z     395. 
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5786608Z     396.     /**
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5787041Z     397.      * Fuzzy search the source index for symbol fully-qualified names that match [query].
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5787542Z     398.      *
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5787994Z     399.      * The matcher is case-insensitive and substring-based against `fq_names.fq_name`. Results
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5788776Z     400.      * are ordered so that exact matches and short, simple-name matches rank first; remaining
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5789593Z     401.      * matches are returned alphabetically. An empty or blank [query] returns the most-frequently
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5790174Z     402.      * referenced symbols up to [limit].
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5790463Z     403.      *
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5790892Z     404.      * Returns an empty list when the workspace has not been indexed yet or the schema is stale,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5791620Z     405.      * mirroring the safe defaults used by the metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5792021Z     406.      */
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5792451Z     407.     fun searchSymbols(query: String, limit: Int = 25): List<String> {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5792935Z     408.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5793342Z     409.         if (limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5793685Z     410.         val trimmed = query.trim()
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5794048Z     411.         return readMetric(emptyList()) { conn ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5794433Z     412.             val sql = if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5794761Z     413.                 """
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5795050Z     414.                 SELECT names.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5795380Z     415.                 FROM fq_names names
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5795798Z     416.                 JOIN symbol_references refs ON refs.target_fq_id = names.fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5796228Z     417.                 GROUP BY names.fq_id
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5796568Z     418.                 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, names.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5796911Z     419.                 LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5797187Z     420.                 """.trimIndent()
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5797480Z     421.             } else {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5797754Z     422.                 """
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5798029Z     423.                 SELECT names.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5798341Z     424.                 FROM fq_names names
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5798706Z     425.                 WHERE LOWER(names.fq_name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5799065Z     426.                 ORDER BY
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5799507Z     427.                     CASE
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5799829Z     428.                         WHEN LOWER(names.fq_name) = ? THEN 0
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5800256Z     429.                         WHEN LOWER(names.fq_name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\' THEN 1
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5800693Z     430.                         WHEN LOWER(names.fq_name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\' THEN 2
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5801084Z     431.                         ELSE 3
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5801736Z     432.                     END,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5802064Z     433.                     LENGTH(names.fq_name) ASC,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5802583Z     434.                     names.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5802882Z     435.                 LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5803161Z     436.                 """.trimIndent()
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5803447Z     437.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5803755Z     438.             conn.prepareStatement(sql).use { stmt ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5804147Z     439.                 if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5804521Z     440.                     stmt.setInt(1, limit)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5804868Z     441.                 } else {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5805404Z     442.                     val needle = trimmed.lowercase().replace("\\", "\\\\").replace("%", "\\%").replace("_", "\\_")
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5805960Z     443.                     stmt.setString(1, "%$needle%")
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5806389Z     444.                     stmt.setString(2, trimmed.lowercase())
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5806811Z     445.                     stmt.setString(3, "%.$needle")
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5807205Z     446.                     stmt.setString(4, "$needle%")
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5807587Z     447.                     stmt.setInt(5, limit)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5807924Z     448.                 }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5808237Z     449.                 stmt.executeQuery().use { rs ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5808537Z     450.                     buildList {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5808829Z     451.                         while (rs.next()) {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5809156Z     452.                             add(rs.getString(1))
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5809503Z     453.                         }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5809798Z     454.                     }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5810078Z     455.                 }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5810335Z     456.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5810580Z     457.         }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5810822Z     458.     }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5811051Z     459. 
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5811505Z     460.     fun graph(fqName: String, depth: Int): MetricsGraph {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5811987Z     461.         require(depth >= 0) { "depth must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5812427Z     462. 
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5853721Z     463.         val focal = fanInMetric(fqName)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5854222Z     464.         val impact = changeImpactRadius(fqName = fqName, depth = depth)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5854876Z     465.         val directReferences = impact.filter { it.depth == 1 && it.viaTargetFqName == fqName }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5855539Z     466.         val childIdsByParent = buildChildIdsByParent(focal, impact)
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5856172Z     467.         val impactBySourcePath = impact.groupBy { it.sourcePath }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5856596Z     468.         val nodes = buildList {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5857043Z     469.             add(focalSymbolNode(fqName, focal, directReferences, childIdsByParent))
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5857565Z     470.             focal?.targetPath?.let { targetPath ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5858026Z     471.                 add(targetFileNode(targetPath, focal, childIdsByParent))
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5858458Z     472.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5858820Z     473.             impactBySourcePath.forEach { (_, nodesForPath) ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5859296Z     474.                 val representative = nodesForPath.minBy { it.depth }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5859970Z     475.                 add(sourceFileNode(nodesForPath, childIdsByParent, parentIdFor(representative, impact, fqName)))
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5860946Z     476.                 nodesForPath.forEach { node -> add(referenceEdgeNode(node)) }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5861554Z     477.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5861813Z     478.         }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5862064Z     479.         val edges = buildList {
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5862423Z     480.             focal?.targetPath?.let { targetPath ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5862772Z     481.                 add(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5863074Z     482.                     MetricsGraphEdge(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5863435Z     483.                         from = fileNodeId(targetPath),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5863991Z     484.                         to = symbolNodeId(fqName),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5864417Z     485.                         edgeType = MetricsGraphEdgeType.CONTAINS,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5864799Z     486.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5865065Z     487.                 )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5865320Z     488.             }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5865673Z     489.             impactBySourcePath.forEach { (_, nodesForPath) ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5866162Z     490.                 val representative = nodesForPath.minBy { it.depth }
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5866576Z     491.                 add(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5866880Z     492.                     MetricsGraphEdge(
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5867309Z     493.                         from = parentIdFor(representative, impact, fqName),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5867840Z     494.                         to = sourceFileNodeId(representative.sourcePath),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5868349Z     495.                         edgeType = MetricsGraphEdgeType.REFERENCED_BY,
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5868967Z     496.                         weight = nodesForPath.sumOf(ChangeImpactNode::occurrenceCount),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5869436Z     497.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5869708Z     498.                 )
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5870014Z     499.                 nodesForPath.forEach { node ->
2026-05-04T14:08:55.5870352Z     500.                     add(
2026-05-04T14:08:56.1699065Z

2026-05-04T14:09:27.3701955Z     44.         }
2026-05-04T14:09:27.3702216Z     45.         if (parsed.flags.contains(HELP_FLAG)) {

2026-05-04T14:09:27.3702928Z     47.         }
2026-05-04T14:09:27.3703214Z     48.         if (parsed.positionals.firstOrNull() == "help") {

2026-05-04T14:09:27.3703981Z     50.         }
2026-05-04T14:09:27.3704380Z     51.         if (parsed.flags.contains(VERSION_FLAG) || parsed.positionals == listOf("version")) {

2026-05-04T14:09:41.4672621Z 1. **Metrics file filtering** - The `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery` have no `fileFilter`/`folderFilter` fields currently. I need to add support for pattern match and folder filtering.
2026-05-04T14:09:41.4673496Z 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.4674089Z 2. **Workspace path default** - Currently `requireWorkspaceRootPath()` throws an error if `--workspace-root` is missing. Need to default to the current working directory.
2026-05-04T14:09:41.4674554Z 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.4675204Z 3. **Index database path** - Need to understand the current path structure for the git hash - looking at `WorkspaceDirectoryResolver.workspaceDataDirectory()`, for git repos it uses `configHome()/workspaces/{host}/{owner}/{repo}/{workspaceHash(normalizedRoot)}`. 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.4675910Z 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.4676308Z The requirement is to simplify this to just `{host}/{owner}/{repo}` without the workspace hash component. Let me review the relevant code sections to understand what changes are needed.

2026-05-04T14:09:41.6303295Z     747.         val request = json.decodeFromString<KastMetricsRequest>(rawJson)
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6303819Z     748.         val workspaceRoot = requireWorkspaceRoot(request.workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6304268Z     749.         val query = KastMetricsQuery(
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6304665Z     750.             workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6305041Z     751.             metric = request.metric,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6305391Z     752.             limit = request.limit,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6305733Z     753.             symbol = request.symbol,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6306077Z     754.             depth = request.depth,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6306668Z     755.         )
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6307077Z     756.         val resultsJson = MetricsEngine(Path.of(workspaceRoot)).use { engine ->
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6307594Z     757.             when (request.metric) {
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6308177Z     758.                 WrapperMetric.FAN_IN -> encodeFanInMetrics(json, engine.fanInRanking(request.limit))
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6308989Z     759.                 WrapperMetric.FAN_OUT -> encodeFanOutMetrics(json, engine.fanOutRanking(request.limit))
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6309854Z     760.                 WrapperMetric.COUPLING -> encodeModuleCouplingMetrics(json, engine.moduleCouplingMatrix())
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6310977Z     761.                 WrapperMetric.LOW_USAGE -> encodeLowUsageSymbols(json, engine.lowUsageSymbols(limit = request.limit))
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6311998Z     762.                 WrapperMetric.CYCLES -> encodeModuleCycleMetrics(json, engine.moduleCycles())
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6312813Z     763.                 WrapperMetric.MODULE_DEPTH -> encodeModuleDepthMetrics(json, engine.moduleDepthMetrics())
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6313674Z     764.                 WrapperMetric.DEAD_CODE -> encodeDeadCodeCandidates(json, engine.deadCodeCandidates())
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6314378Z     765.                 WrapperMetric.IMPACT -> encodeChangeImpactNodes(
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6314783Z     766.                     json,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6315097Z     767.                     engine.changeImpactRadius(
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6315498Z     768.                         fqName = request.symbol ?: throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6315917Z     769.                             code = "SKILL_VALIDATION",
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6316345Z     770.                             message = "'symbol' is required for impact metric",
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6316719Z     771.                         ),
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6317007Z     772.                         depth = request.depth,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6317309Z     773.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6317550Z     774.                 )
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6317779Z     775.             }
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6317991Z     776.         }
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6318250Z     777.         return KastMetricsSuccessResponse(
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6318555Z     778.             ok = true,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6318796Z     779.             query = query,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6319068Z     780.             results = resultsJson,
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6319407Z     781.             logFile = SkillLogFile.placeholder(),
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6319699Z     782.         )
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6319895Z     783.     }
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6320097Z     784. 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6320286Z     785.     // endregion
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6320506Z     786. 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6320707Z     787.     // region shared
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6320948Z     788. 
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6321715Z     789.     private fun requireWorkspaceRoot(explicit: String?): String = SkillWrapperInput.resolveWorkspaceRoot(explicit)
2026-05-04T14:09:41.6322299Z     790.

2026-05-04T14:09:41.6323877Z     793.         backendName = null,

2026-05-04T14:09:41.6324451Z     795.     )

2026-05-04T14:10:51.3540482Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3541151Z copilot: Now I have a good understanding of what needs to change. Let me formulate a plan:
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3541662Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3541907Z 1. **Metrics file filtering** - Add `fileGlob` (glob pattern) and `folderFilter` (folder path prefix) to:
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3542553Z    - `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery` in `WrapperContracts.kt`
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3542884Z    - `CliCommand.Metrics` in `CliCommand.kt`
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3543234Z    - `MetricsEngine` methods (fanIn, fanOut, deadCode, impact, etc.) - add filtering capability
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3543650Z    - CLI parser to handle `--file-glob` and `--folder` options
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3543992Z    - `SkillWrapperExecutor` and `CliExecution` to pass through the filters
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3544224Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3544694Z 2. **Workspace path default** - Change `requireWorkspaceRootPath()` to fall back to `System.getProperty("user.dir")` instead of throwing, and update the skill wrapper's `requireWorkspaceRoot()` similarly.
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3545204Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3545883Z 3. **Index database path** - Remove the `workspaceHash` segment from the git-remote path, changing from `configHome/workspaces/{host}/{owner}/{repo}/{workspaceHash}` to `configHome/workspaces/{host}/{owner}/{repo}`.  This is a breaking change since existing databases won't be found at the new location.
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3546646Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3547584Z For the filtering approach in MetricsEngine, I need to handle pattern matching like `*.test.kt` or `**/*Test.kt` and folder filtering like `/src/main/kotlin/com/example`. SQL works well for folder prefix matching, but glob patterns are easier to handle post-query in Kotlin. I'm thinking of creating a `MetricsFilter` data class in the index-store module to pass filtering logic to MetricsEngine methods.
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3548549Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3549437Z Looking at how paths are stored in the database as root-relative paths like `/app/A.kt`, I can filter folders by matching the dir_path prefix in SQL and use `FileSystems.getDefault().getPathMatcher()` for glob patterns after fetching results. The architecture would have MetricsEngine accept an optional filter parameter that applies both SQL-level and post-processing filtering.
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3550357Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3551397Z But thinking about this more strategically, I should create a `FileFilter` abstraction with variants for glob patterns and folder prefixes, then apply it consistently across MetricsEngine and thread it through the CLI. Since FanIn, FanOut, DeadCode, ChangeImpact, and LowUsage all filter on different path fields (targets, sources, etc.), I can extract a common filtering utility that works across these analyses.
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3552397Z 
2026-05-04T14:10:51.3552649Z Now I need to check how the existing CLI tests are structured to make sure my changes don't break the current interface.

2026-05-04T14:10:55.7702810Z     602.     private fun moduleDepthDiagnosis(
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7703218Z     603.         fileCount: Int,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7703525Z     604.         internalRefCount: Int,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7703865Z     605.         externalRefCount: Int,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7704181Z     606.         cohesionRatio: Double,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7704491Z     607.         refsPerFile: Double,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7704803Z     608.     ): ModuleDepthDiagnosis =
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7705100Z     609.         when {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7705521Z     610.             fileCount > 50 && cohesionRatio > 0.8 -> ModuleDepthDiagnosis.MONOLITH
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7706145Z     611.             cohesionRatio > 0.5 && refsPerFile > 3.0 -> ModuleDepthDiagnosis.DEEP
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7706811Z     612.             internalRefCount == 0 && externalRefCount > 0 -> ModuleDepthDiagnosis.PASS_THROUGH
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7707546Z     613.             cohesionRatio < 0.3 || refsPerFile < 1.0 -> ModuleDepthDiagnosis.SHALLOW
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7708078Z     614.             else -> ModuleDepthDiagnosis.DEEP
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7708657Z     615.         }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7708888Z     616. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7709388Z     617.     private fun stronglyConnectedComponents(adjacency: Map<String, List<String>>): List<Set<String>> {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7709985Z     618.         var nextIndex = 0
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7710341Z     619.         val indexByNode = mutableMapOf<String, Int>()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7710770Z     620.         val lowLinkByNode = mutableMapOf<String, Int>()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7711167Z     621.         val stack = ArrayDeque<String>()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7711937Z     622.         val onStack = mutableSetOf<String>()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7712337Z     623.         val components = mutableListOf<Set<String>>()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7712679Z     624. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7712924Z     625.         fun connect(node: String) {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7713274Z     626.             indexByNode[node] = nextIndex
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7713647Z     627.             lowLinkByNode[node] = nextIndex
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7713993Z     628.             nextIndex += 1
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7714285Z     629.             stack.addLast(node)
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7714491Z     630.             onStack += node
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7714682Z     631. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7714883Z     632.             adjacency[node].orEmpty().forEach { target ->
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7715166Z     633.                 if (target !in indexByNode) {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7715410Z     634.                     connect(target)
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7715654Z     635.                     lowLinkByNode[node] = minOf(
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7715927Z     636.                         checkNotNull(lowLinkByNode[node]),
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7716208Z     637.                         checkNotNull(lowLinkByNode[target]),
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7716451Z     638.                     )
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7716661Z     639.                 } else if (target in onStack) {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7716910Z     640.                     lowLinkByNode[node] = minOf(
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7717168Z     641.                         checkNotNull(lowLinkByNode[node]),
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7717428Z     642.                         checkNotNull(indexByNode[target]),
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7717653Z     643.                     )
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7717827Z     644.                 }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7717996Z     645.             }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7718163Z     646. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7718361Z     647.             if (lowLinkByNode[node] == indexByNode[node]) {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7718622Z     648.                 val component = buildSet {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7718843Z     649.                     do {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7719067Z     650.                         val member = stack.removeLast()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7719317Z     651.                         onStack -= member
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7719543Z     652.                         add(member)
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7719765Z     653.                     } while (member != node)
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7719978Z     654.                 }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7720180Z     655.                 components += component
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7720384Z     656.             }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7720544Z     657.         }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7720691Z     658. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7720873Z     659.         adjacency.keys.sorted().forEach { node ->
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7721135Z     660.             if (node !in indexByNode) connect(node)
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7721530Z     661.         }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7721694Z     662.         return components
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7721886Z     663.     }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7722031Z     664. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7722198Z     665.     private fun shortestCycle(
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7722416Z     666.         component: Set<String>,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7722640Z     667.         adjacency: Map<String, List<String>>,
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7722868Z     668.     ): List<String>? =
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7723088Z     669.         component.sorted().mapNotNull { start ->
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7723349Z     670.             val queue = ArrayDeque<List<String>>()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7723752Z     671.             queue.add(listOf(start))
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7723987Z     672.             var found: List<String>? = null
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7724244Z     673.             while (queue.isNotEmpty() && found == null) {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7724510Z     674.                 val path = queue.removeFirst()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7724779Z     675.                 adjacency[path.last()].orEmpty()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7725025Z     676.                     .filter { it in component }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7725256Z     677.                     .forEach { next ->
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7725585Z     678.                         when {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7725844Z     679.                             next == start && path.size > 1 -> found = path + start
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7726152Z     680.                             next !in path -> queue.add(path + next)
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7726404Z     681.                         }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7726589Z     682.                     }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7726766Z     683.             }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7726930Z     684.             found
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7727234Z     685.         }.minWithOrNull(compareBy<List<String>>({ it.size }, { it.joinToString(" -> ") }))
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7727554Z     686. 
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7727708Z     687.     override fun close() {
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7727926Z     688.         cachedConnection?.let { conn ->
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7728164Z     689.             if (!conn.isClosed) conn.close()
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7728372Z     690.         }
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7728538Z     691.         cachedConnection = null
2026-05-04T14:10:55.7728738Z     692.     }

2026-05-04T14:12:07.2614775Z 
2026-05-04T14:12:07.2618013Z Each method will apply the filter to different path fields depending on the query type—`targetPath` for fan-in and low-usage lookups, `sourcePath` for fan-out and impact analysis, and `path` for dead code detection. Module-level metrics like coupling and cycles...
2026-05-04T14:12:07.2618891Z 
2026-05-04T14:12:07.2621544Z Updating the request and query data classes... Now I need to wire up the file filtering throughout the execution layer—passing the `FileFilterSpec` from the CLI commands down through `SkillWrapperExecutor` and `CliExecution` to the `MetricsEngine` methods. I should also update the CLI documentation to reflect these new filtering options, then write tests covering the filtering behavior for both fan-in and fan-out rankings with glob patterns and folder prefixes. I'll start with the index database path change since it's the simplest, then move on to the workspace default and filtering logic. 2026-05-04T14:14:02.3050053Z ### 3. Add FileFilterSpec to index-store module
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3050207Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3050434Z Create a new file `index-store/src/main/kotlin/io/github/amichne/kast/indexstore/FileFilterSpec.kt`:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3050774Z ```kotlin
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3050946Z package io.github.amichne.kast.indexstore
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3051099Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3051185Z import java.nio.file.FileSystems
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3051518Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3051597Z /**
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3051809Z  * Generic file-path filter for metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3052028Z  *
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3052267Z  * [fileGlob] is a glob pattern applied to the full file path (e.g. `**/*Test.kt`).
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3052655Z  * [folderPrefix] is a path prefix filter - only files whose path starts with this
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3052981Z  * prefix are included (e.g. `/src/main/kotlin`).
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3053193Z  *
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3053407Z  * Both filters are combined with AND semantics when both are non-null.
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3053663Z  */
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3053811Z data class FileFilterSpec(
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3054001Z     val fileGlob: String? = null,
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3054213Z     val folderPrefix: String? = null,
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3054403Z ) {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3054551Z     private val globMatcher by lazy {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3054746Z         fileGlob?.let {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3055042Z             val pattern = if (it.startsWith("glob:") || it.startsWith("regex:")) it else "glob:$it"
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3055415Z             FileSystems.getDefault().getPathMatcher(pattern)
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3055650Z         }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3055789Z     }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3055870Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3055994Z     /** Returns true if [path] passes all configured filters. */
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3056391Z     fun matches(path: String?): Boolean {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3056612Z         if (path == null) return false
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3056824Z         if (folderPrefix != null) {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3057150Z             val normalised = if (folderPrefix.endsWith("/")) folderPrefix else "$folderPrefix/"
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3057554Z             if (!path.startsWith(normalised) && path != folderPrefix) return false
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3057828Z         }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3057983Z         if (globMatcher != null) {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3058214Z             val filePath = java.nio.file.Path.of(path)
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3058626Z             if (!globMatcher!!.matches(filePath)) return false
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3058894Z         }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059049Z         return true
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059206Z     }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059283Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059429Z     val isEmpty: Boolean get() = fileGlob == null && folderPrefix == null
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059695Z }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059768Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3059992Z /** Filters a list retaining only items where [pathExtractor] returns a path that passes [filter]. */
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3060473Z fun <T> List<T>.filterByPath(filter: FileFilterSpec, pathExtractor: (T) -> String?): List<T> =
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3060903Z     if (filter.isEmpty) this else filter { item -> filter.matches(pathExtractor(item)) }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3061199Z ```
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3061432Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3061675Z Then create tests `index-store/src/test/kotlin/io/github/amichne/kast/indexstore/FileFilterSpecTest.kt`:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3062040Z ```kotlin

2026-05-04T14:14:02.3062358Z

2026-05-04T14:14:02.3062892Z class FileFilterSpecTest {

2026-05-04T14:14:02.3072134Z         assertTrue(filter.matches("/src/test/FooTest.kt"))
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3072458Z         assertFalse(filter.matches("/src/main/FooTest.kt"))  // fails folderPrefix

2026-05-04T14:14:02.3077159Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3077258Z ### 4. Add filtering to MetricsEngine methods
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3077408Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3077696Z Add `filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec()` parameter to these methods in MetricsEngine:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3078157Z - `fanInRanking(limit: Int, filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec())` - filter on `targetPath`
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3078704Z - `fanOutRanking(limit: Int, filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec())` - filter on `sourcePath`
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3079344Z - `lowUsageSymbols(maxOccurrences: Int = 2, limit: Int = 50, filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec())` - filter on `targetPath`
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3079949Z - `deadCodeCandidates(filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec())` - filter on `path`
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3080451Z - `changeImpactRadius(fqName: String, depth: Int, filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec())` - filter on `sourcePath`
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3080856Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3080918Z For fanIn:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3081064Z ```kotlin
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3081493Z fun fanInRanking(limit: Int, filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec()): List<FanInMetric> {
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3081873Z     // ... existing query ...
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3082140Z     return readMetricRows(...).filterByPath(filter) { it.targetPath }
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3082516Z ```
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3082591Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3083776Z Increase the SQL LIMIT to handle post-filter: when a filter is active, fetch `limit * 5` from SQL then post-filter and take(limit). When no filter, use `limit` directly. Actually simpler: always apply filter after, but keep LIMIT in SQL as-is and just add `.filterByPath(filter)` after the query. The limit acts as an upper bound on pre-filter rows so may not return `limit` filtered results, but that's acceptable for now. The `limit` parameter is a hint for how many to return.
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3085145Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3086085Z Actually for fan-in and fan-out, the query already has `LIMIT ?`. When filtering is active, we should fetch more rows then post-filter. A simple approach: if filter is non-empty, use `limit * FILTER_FETCH_MULTIPLIER` (say 10) as the SQL limit, then post-filter and take `limit`. If filter is empty, use `limit` as SQL limit.
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3086975Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3087598Z For simplicity, add a `private fun MetricsEngine.effectiveSqlLimit(requestedLimit: Int, filter: FileFilterSpec): Int = if (filter.isEmpty) requestedLimit else requestedLimit * 10` helper, cap at max reasonable value.
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3088264Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3088902Z Actually looking at the existing code more carefully, the SQL LIMIT is bound via `bind = { setInt(1, limit) }`. We need to change the bind when filtering. Let me make it simpler - just always apply post-filter after, use the requestedLimit for SQL:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3090005Z - When `filter.isEmpty` → unchanged behavior
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3090530Z - When filter is set → SQL still runs with `limit`, then filter is applied (may return fewer than limit)
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3090830Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3091025Z This is the simplest correct approach. Add a note in docs that filtering is post-SQL.
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3091536Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3091818Z Add tests in `index-store/src/test/kotlin/io/github/amichne/kast/indexstore/MetricsEngineTest.kt` for the filtering:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3092351Z ```kotlin
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3092494Z @Test

2026-05-04T14:14:02.3101530Z ### 5. Thread filtering through wrapper contracts and CLI
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3101740Z 
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3102181Z **In `WrapperContracts.kt`**, add `fileGlob: String? = null` and `folderFilter: String? = null` to `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`:
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3102614Z ```kotlin
2026-05-04T14:14:02.3102761Z @Serializable

2026-05-04T14:14:17.0116944Z     Do not start by reading `.kast-version` or the full OpenAPI fixture.

2026-05-04T14:14:17.0118070Z     instead of switching to non-semantic Kotlin search.

2026-05-04T14:14:17.0118641Z     ## Command map
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0118874Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0119084Z     | Task | Command |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0119380Z     | --- | --- |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0119730Z     | List modules or source files | `kast skill workspace-files` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0120150Z     | Understand a file or type | `kast skill scaffold` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0120533Z     | Resolve an exact declaration | `kast skill resolve` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0120940Z     | Find usages or constructor call sites | `kast skill references` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0121570Z     | Trace incoming/outgoing flow | `kast skill callers` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0121926Z     | Query indexed metrics | `kast skill metrics` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0122250Z     | Rename safely | `kast skill rename` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0122609Z     | Apply code and validate it | `kast skill write-and-validate` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0123028Z     | Re-check touched files | `kast skill diagnostics` |
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0123335Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0123534Z     ## Request and response shape
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0123786Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0123993Z     - Request JSON uses camelCase.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0124287Z     - Wrapper responses also use camelCase.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0124692Z     - Nested API model fields use the same camelCase names. Common examples are
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0125225Z       `symbol.fqName`, `symbol.location.filePath`, `symbol.location.startOffset`,
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0125662Z       and `references[].location.filePath`.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0126095Z     - Any field ending in `filePath`, `filePaths`, or `contentFile` should be an
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0126481Z       absolute path.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0126807Z     - Check `ok` and `type` first. Failure responses include `stage`, `message`,
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0127216Z       optional `error` or `errorText`, and `logFile`.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0127978Z     - `rename` and `write-and-validate` requests require a `type` discriminator:
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0128499Z       `RENAME_BY_SYMBOL_REQUEST`, `RENAME_BY_OFFSET_REQUEST`,
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0128897Z       `CREATE_FILE_REQUEST`, `INSERT_AT_OFFSET_REQUEST`, or
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0129232Z       `REPLACE_RANGE_REQUEST`.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0129624Z     - `workspaceRoot` defaults to the current working directory when omitted.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0130032Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0130222Z     ## Common requests
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0130445Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0130641Z     ### List workspace files
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0131112Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0131580Z     ```bash
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0131982Z     "$KAST_CLI_PATH" skill workspace-files '{"includeFiles":true,"maxFilesPerModule":500}'
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0132469Z     ```
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0132682Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0133043Z     `includeFiles` returns a capped file list for each module. If a module has more
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0133659Z     files than the cap, the response marks that module with `filesTruncated:true`
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0134226Z     while keeping `fileCount` as the total discovered source file count.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0134600Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0134813Z     ### Resolve an ambiguous property
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0135096Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0135294Z     ```bash
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0135509Z     "$KAST_CLI_PATH" skill resolve '{
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0135792Z       "symbol":"date",
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0136036Z       "kind":"property",
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0136328Z       "containingType":"com.example.EventBean",
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0136684Z       "fileHint":"/abs/path/EventBean.kt"
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0136984Z     }'
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0137179Z     ```
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0137360Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0137567Z     ### Find usages of a type or property
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0137826Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0138003Z     ```bash
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0138221Z     "$KAST_CLI_PATH" skill references '{
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0138520Z       "symbol":"EventBean",
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0138795Z       "fileHint":"/abs/path/EventBean.kt",
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0139111Z       "includeDeclaration":true
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0139376Z     }'
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0139574Z     ```
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0139758Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0140120Z     If a projection such as `.references[].location.filePath` returns nothing, inspect one
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0140592Z     item before assuming the command failed:
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0140882Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0141065Z     ```bash
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0141588Z     "$KAST_CLI_PATH" skill references '{"symbol":"EventBean","includeDeclaration":true}' \
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0142115Z       | jq '{ok,type,firstReference:.references[0]}'
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0142428Z     ```
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0142609Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0142924Z     Wrapper metadata and nested API fields both use camelCase, including
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0143389Z     `logFile`, `filePath`, and `location.filePath`.
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0143709Z     
2026-05-04T14:14:17.0143918Z     ### Trace callers

2026-05-04T14:15:11.9168244Z     48.     private fun isEphemeralLocalWorkspace(workspaceRoot: Path): Boolean {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9168670Z     49.         val tempRoot = Path.of(System.getProperty("java.io.tmpdir")).toAbsolutePath().normalize()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9169039Z     50.         return workspaceRoot.startsWith(tempRoot)

2026-05-04T14:15:11.9169607Z     53.     private fun localWorkspaceId(workspaceRoot: Path): String {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9170017Z     54.         val registryPath = configHome().resolve("local-workspaces.json").toAbsolutePath().normalize()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9170395Z     55.         val workspaceKey = workspaceRoot.toString()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9170723Z     56.         val lockPath = registryPath.resolveSibling("local-workspaces.json.lock")
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9171087Z     57.         registryPath.parent?.let(Files::createDirectories)
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9171596Z     58.         java.io.RandomAccessFile(lockPath.toFile(), "rw").use { raf ->
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9171882Z     59.             raf.channel.lock().use {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9172149Z     60.                 val registry = readRegistry(registryPath).toMutableMap()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9172438Z     61.                 registry[workspaceKey]?.let { return it }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9172689Z     62.                 val id = uuidGenerator().toString()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9172929Z     63.                 registry[workspaceKey] = id
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9173187Z     64.                 writeRegistry(registryPath, registry)
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9173413Z     65.                 return id
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9173591Z     66.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9173748Z     67.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9173893Z     68.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9174037Z     69. 
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9174264Z     70.     private fun readRegistry(registryPath: Path): Map<String, String> {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9174709Z     71.         if (!Files.isRegularFile(registryPath)) {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9175001Z     72.             return emptyMap()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9175250Z     73.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9175462Z     74.         return runCatching {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9175974Z     75.             val json = Json.parseToJsonElement(Files.readString(registryPath)) as? JsonObject ?: return emptyMap()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9176555Z     76.             json.mapNotNull { (key, value) ->
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9176988Z     77.                 value.jsonPrimitive.contentOrNull?.let { id -> key to id }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9177568Z     78.             }.toMap()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9177830Z     79.         }.getOrDefault(emptyMap())
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9178105Z     80.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9178308Z     81. 
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9178657Z     82.     private fun writeRegistry(registryPath: Path, registry: Map<String, String>) {
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9179164Z     83.         registryPath.parent?.let(Files::createDirectories)
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9179701Z     84.         val json = JsonObject(registry.toSortedMap().mapValues { (_, value) -> JsonPrimitive(value) })
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9180388Z     85.         Files.writeString(registryPath, Json.encodeToString(JsonObject.serializer(), json))
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9180833Z     86.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9181039Z     87. 
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9181560Z     88.     private fun sanitizedPath(workspaceRoot: Path): String = workspaceRoot
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9181991Z     89.         .toString()
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9182258Z     90.         .replace(Regex("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+"), "-")
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9182580Z     91.         .trim('-')
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9182782Z     92.         .ifBlank { "workspace" }
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9182982Z     93.         .take(80)
2026-05-04T14:15:11.9183144Z     94. }
