2026-05-04T14:15:27.5558432Z     37. internal class CliCommandParser(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5558651Z     38.     private val json: Json,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5558845Z     39. ) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5559045Z     40.     fun parse(args: Array<String>): CliCommand {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5559313Z     41.         val parsed = ParsedArguments.parse(args)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5559690Z     42.         if (parsed.positionals.isEmpty() && parsed.options.isEmpty() && parsed.flags.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5560085Z     43.             return CliCommand.Help()
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5560293Z     44.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5560488Z     45.         if (parsed.flags.contains(HELP_FLAG)) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5560773Z     46.             return CliCommand.Help(parsed.positionals)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5561001Z     47.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5561209Z     48.         if (parsed.positionals.firstOrNull() == "help") {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5561880Z     49.             return CliCommand.Help(parsed.positionals.drop(1))
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5562266Z     50.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5562699Z     51.         if (parsed.flags.contains(VERSION_FLAG) || parsed.positionals == listOf("version")) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5563446Z     52.             if (parsed.options.isNotEmpty() || parsed.positionals.size > 1 || (parsed.positionals.isNotEmpty() && parsed.positionals != listOf("version"))) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5563925Z     53.                 throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5564145Z     54.                     code = "CLI_USAGE",
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5564441Z     55.                     message = "--version does not accept additional arguments",
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5564772Z     56.                     details = CliCommandCatalog.topLevelUsageDetails(),
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5565037Z     57.                 )
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5565211Z     58.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5565401Z     59.             return CliCommand.Version
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5565907Z     60.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5566179Z     61.         if (parsed.positionals.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5566501Z     62.             throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5566808Z     63.                 code = "CLI_USAGE",
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5567181Z     64.                 message = "A command is required",
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5567617Z     65.                 details = CliCommandCatalog.topLevelUsageDetails(),
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5568033Z     66.             )
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5568276Z     67.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5568491Z     68. 
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5569026Z     69.         if (parsed.positionals.firstOrNull() == "skill") {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5569458Z     70.             return parseSkillCommand(parsed)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5569808Z     71.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5570041Z     72. 
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5570382Z     73.         val metadata = CliCommandCatalog.find(parsed.positionals)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5570817Z     74.         if (metadata != null) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5571211Z     75.             return parseKnownCommand(metadata, parsed)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5571733Z     76.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5572144Z     77.         if (CliCommandCatalog.commandsUnder(parsed.positionals).isNotEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5572721Z     78.             return CliCommand.Help(parsed.positionals)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5573077Z     79.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5573301Z     80. 
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5573547Z     81.         throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5573859Z     82.             code = "CLI_USAGE",
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5574270Z     83.             message = "Unknown command: ${args.joinToString(" ")}",
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5574882Z     84.             details = CliCommandCatalog.unknownCommandDetails(parsed.positionals),
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5575392Z     85.         )
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5575631Z     86.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5575849Z     87. 
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5576111Z     88.     private fun parseKnownCommand(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5576474Z     89.         metadata: CliCommandMetadata,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5576813Z     90.         parsed: ParsedArguments,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5577144Z     91.     ): CliCommand {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5577435Z     92.         return try {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5577758Z     93.             when (metadata.path) {
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5578333Z     94.                 listOf("workspace", "status") -> CliCommand.WorkspaceStatus(parsed.runtimeOptions())
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5579098Z     95.                 listOf("workspace", "ensure") -> CliCommand.WorkspaceEnsure(parsed.runtimeOptions())

2026-05-04T14:15:27.5615800Z     66.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5616227Z     67.         if (limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5616567Z     68. 
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5616802Z     69.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5617127Z     70.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5617437Z     71.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5617786Z     72.                     SELECT source_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5618176Z     73.                            refs.src_filename,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5618558Z     74.                            source_meta.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5619009Z     75.                            source_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5619414Z     76.                            COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5619892Z     77.                            COUNT(DISTINCT refs.target_fq_id) AS target_symbol_count,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5620376Z     78.                            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5620778Z     79.                                WHEN refs.tgt_prefix_id IS NULL THEN NULL
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5621389Z     80.                                ELSE refs.tgt_prefix_id || ':' || refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5621834Z     81.                            END) AS target_file_count,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5622343Z     82.                            COUNT(DISTINCT target_meta.module_path) AS target_module_count,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5623053Z     83.                            SUM(CASE WHEN refs.tgt_prefix_id IS NULL OR target_meta.prefix_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5623655Z     84.                                 AS external_target_count
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5624042Z     85.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5624608Z     86.                     JOIN path_prefixes source_prefix ON source_prefix.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5625179Z     87.                     LEFT JOIN file_metadata source_meta
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5625610Z     88.                       ON source_meta.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5626072Z     89.                      AND source_meta.filename = refs.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5626506Z     90.                     LEFT JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5626937Z     91.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5627407Z     92.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5628082Z     93.                     GROUP BY refs.src_prefix_id, refs.src_filename, source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5628729Z     94.                     ORDER BY occurrence_count DESC,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5629316Z     95.                              source_prefix.dir_path ASC,
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5629734Z     96.                              refs.src_filename ASC
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5630090Z     97.                     LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:15:27.5630404Z     98.                 """.trimIndent(),

2026-05-04T14:15:33.3559929Z     117.     fun moduleCouplingMatrix(): List<ModuleCouplingMetric> =
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3560213Z     118.         readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3560510Z     119.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3560709Z     120.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3560967Z     121.                     SELECT source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3561579Z     122.                            target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3561867Z     123.                            COUNT(*) AS reference_count
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3562229Z     124.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3562474Z     125.                     JOIN file_metadata source_meta
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3562804Z     126.                       ON source_meta.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3563144Z     127.                      AND source_meta.filename = refs.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3563405Z     128.                     JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3563764Z     129.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3564044Z     130.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3564350Z     131.                     WHERE source_meta.module_path IS NOT NULL
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3564685Z     132.                       AND target_meta.module_path IS NOT NULL
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3565214Z     133.                       AND source_meta.module_path <> target_meta.module_path
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3565814Z     134.                     GROUP BY source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set, target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3566446Z     135.                     ORDER BY reference_count DESC, source_meta.module_path ASC, target_meta.module_path ASC
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3566875Z     136.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3567153Z     137.                 fields = ModuleCouplingField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3567535Z     138.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3567862Z     139.                     ModuleCouplingMetric(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3568197Z     140.                         sourceModulePath = string(ModuleCouplingField.SOURCE_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3568750Z     141.                         sourceSourceSet = nullableString(ModuleCouplingField.SOURCE_SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3569391Z     142.                         targetModulePath = string(ModuleCouplingField.TARGET_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3569813Z     143.                         targetSourceSet = nullableString(ModuleCouplingField.TARGET_SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3570308Z     144.                         referenceCount = int(ModuleCouplingField.REFERENCE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3570595Z     145.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3570776Z     146.                 },

2026-05-04T14:15:33.3571841Z     150.     fun lowUsageSymbols(maxOccurrences: Int = 2, limit: Int = 50): List<LowUsageSymbol> {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3572284Z     151.         require(maxOccurrences >= 0) { "maxOccurrences must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3572741Z     152.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3573052Z     153.         if (maxOccurrences == 0 || limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3573365Z     154. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3573551Z     155.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3573761Z     156.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3573956Z     157.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3574173Z     158.                     SELECT target_name.fq_name,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3574421Z     159.                            target_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3574666Z     160.                            refs.tgt_filename,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3574908Z     161.                            target_meta.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3575172Z     162.                            COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3575530Z     163.                            COUNT(DISTINCT refs.src_prefix_id || ':' || refs.src_filename) AS source_file_count
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3575882Z     164.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3576189Z     165.                     JOIN fq_names target_name ON target_name.fq_id = refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3576602Z     166.                     JOIN path_prefixes target_prefix ON target_prefix.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3576961Z     167.                     JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3577230Z     168.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3577515Z     169.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3577905Z     170.                     GROUP BY refs.target_fq_id, refs.tgt_prefix_id, refs.tgt_filename, target_meta.module_path
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3578277Z     171.                     HAVING source_file_count = 1
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3578517Z     172.                        AND occurrence_count <= ?
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3578786Z     173.                     ORDER BY COALESCE(target_meta.module_path, '') ASC,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3579067Z     174.                              target_name.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3579455Z     175.                     LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3579659Z     176.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3579891Z     177.                 fields = LowUsageField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3580112Z     178.                 bind = {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3580324Z     179.                     setInt(1, maxOccurrences)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3580558Z     180.                     setInt(2, limit)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3580757Z     181.                 },
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3580936Z     182.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3581138Z     183.                     LowUsageSymbol(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3581639Z     184.                         targetFqName = string(LowUsageField.TARGET_FQ_NAME),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3582057Z     185.                         targetPath = nullablePath(LowUsageField.TARGET_DIR, LowUsageField.TARGET_FILENAME),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3582509Z     186.                         targetModulePath = nullableString(LowUsageField.TARGET_MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3582891Z     187.                         occurrenceCount = int(LowUsageField.OCCURRENCE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3583231Z     188.                         sourceFileCount = int(LowUsageField.SOURCE_FILE_COUNT),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3583499Z     189.                     )

2026-05-04T14:15:33.3584308Z     194. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3584498Z     195.     fun moduleCycles(): List<ModuleCycleMetric> {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3584769Z     196.         val edgeWeights = moduleCouplingMatrix()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3585082Z     197.             .fold(mutableMapOf<Pair<String, String>, Int>()) { weights, edge ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3585435Z     198.                 val key = edge.sourceModulePath to edge.targetModulePath
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3585783Z     199.                 weights[key] = weights.getOrDefault(key, 0) + edge.referenceCount
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3586091Z     200.                 weights
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3586275Z     201.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3586482Z     202.         val adjacency = buildMap<String, List<String>> {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3586879Z     203.             val nodes = edgeWeights.keys.flatMap { (source, target) -> listOf(source, target) }.toSortedSet()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3587251Z     204.             nodes.forEach { node ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3587460Z     205.                 put(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3587639Z     206.                     node,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3587843Z     207.                     edgeWeights.keys
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3588084Z     208.                         .filter { (source, _) -> source == node }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3588351Z     209.                         .map { (_, target) -> target }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3588580Z     210.                         .sorted(),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3588777Z     211.                 )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3588946Z     212.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3589110Z     213.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3589265Z     214. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3589458Z     215.         return stronglyConnectedComponents(adjacency)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3589708Z     216.             .filter { it.size > 1 }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3589929Z     217.             .mapNotNull { component ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3590197Z     218.                 shortestCycle(component, adjacency)?.let { cycle ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3590488Z     219.                     val cycleEdges = cycle.zipWithNext()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3590806Z     220.                     val totalReferenceCount = cycleEdges.sumOf { (source, target) ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3591250Z     221.                         checkNotNull(edgeWeights[source to target]) { "Missing module edge $source -> $target" }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3591700Z     222.                     }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3591922Z     223.                     val weakestEdge = cycleEdges.minWith(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3592307Z     224.                         compareBy<Pair<String, String>>(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3592637Z     225.                             { (source, target) -> checkNotNull(edgeWeights[source to target]) },
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3592950Z     226.                             { it.first },
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3593170Z     227.                             { it.second },
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3593380Z     228.                         ),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3593566Z     229.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3593757Z     230.                     ModuleCycleMetric(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3593978Z     231.                         cycle = cycle,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3594324Z     232.                         totalReferenceCount = totalReferenceCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3594612Z     233.                         weakestEdgeSource = weakestEdge.first,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3594889Z     234.                         weakestEdgeTarget = weakestEdge.second,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3595239Z     235.                         weakestEdgeReferenceCount = checkNotNull(edgeWeights[weakestEdge]),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3595543Z     236.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3595713Z     237.                 }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3595880Z     238.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3596086Z     239.             .sortedBy { it.cycle.joinToString(" -> ") }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3596321Z     240.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3596466Z     241. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3596658Z     242.     fun moduleDepthMetrics(): List<ModuleDepthMetric> =
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3596923Z     243.         readMetric(emptyList()) { conn ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3597188Z     244.             val declarations = moduleDeclarationStats(conn)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3597471Z     245.             val references = moduleReferenceStats(conn)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3597693Z     246. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3597846Z     247.             declarations.values
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3598067Z     248.                 .sortedBy { it.modulePath }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3598300Z     249.                 .map { declaration ->
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3598627Z     250.                     val reference = references[declaration.modulePath] ?: ModuleReferenceStats(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3598981Z     251.                         modulePath = declaration.modulePath,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3599234Z     252.                         internalRefCount = 0,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3599462Z     253.                         externalRefCount = 0,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3599669Z     254.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3599952Z     255.                     val totalRefs = reference.internalRefCount + reference.externalRefCount
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3600429Z     256.                     val cohesionRatio = if (totalRefs == 0) 0.0 else reference.internalRefCount / totalRefs.toDouble()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3601012Z     257.                     val refsPerFile = if (declaration.fileCount == 0) 0.0 else reference.internalRefCount / declaration.fileCount.toDouble()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3601537Z     258.                     ModuleDepthMetric(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3601785Z     259.                         modulePath = declaration.modulePath,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3602051Z     260.                         fileCount = declaration.fileCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3602355Z     261.                         declaredSymbolCount = declaration.declaredSymbolCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3602682Z     262.                         internalRefCount = reference.internalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3602982Z     263.                         externalRefCount = reference.externalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3603262Z     264.                         cohesionRatio = cohesionRatio,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3603527Z     265.                         refsPerFile = refsPerFile,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3603785Z     266.                         diagnosis = moduleDepthDiagnosis(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3604053Z     267.                             fileCount = declaration.fileCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3604345Z     268.                             internalRefCount = reference.internalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3604766Z     269.                             externalRefCount = reference.externalRefCount,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3605068Z     270.                             cohesionRatio = cohesionRatio,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3605330Z     271.                             refsPerFile = refsPerFile,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3605554Z     272.                         ),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3605743Z     273.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3605916Z     274.                 }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3606082Z     275.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3606232Z     276. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3606423Z     277.     fun deadCodeCandidates(): List<DeadCodeCandidate> =
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3606777Z     278.         readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3606964Z     279.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3607155Z     280.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3607366Z     281.                     SELECT identifiers.identifier,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3607622Z     282.                            identifier_prefix.dir_path,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3607885Z     283.                            identifiers.filename,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3608125Z     284.                            metadata.module_path,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3608362Z     285.                            metadata.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3608591Z     286.                            package_name.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3608836Z     287.                     FROM identifier_paths identifiers
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3609222Z     288.                     JOIN path_prefixes identifier_prefix ON identifier_prefix.prefix_id = identifiers.prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3609607Z     289.                      LEFT JOIN file_metadata metadata
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3609875Z     290.                        ON metadata.prefix_id = identifiers.prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3610173Z     291.                       AND metadata.filename = identifiers.filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3610531Z     292.                      LEFT JOIN fq_names package_name ON package_name.fq_id = metadata.package_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3610866Z     293.                      WHERE NOT EXISTS (
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3611081Z     294.                          SELECT 1
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3611411Z     295.                          FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3611725Z     296.                          JOIN fq_names target_name ON target_name.fq_id = refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3612067Z     297.                          WHERE refs.tgt_prefix_id = identifiers.prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3612370Z     298.                            AND refs.tgt_filename = identifiers.filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3612628Z     299.                            AND (
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3612872Z     300.                                target_name.fq_name = identifiers.identifier
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3613201Z     301.                                OR target_name.fq_name LIKE '%.' || identifiers.identifier
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3613480Z     302.                            )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3613671Z     303.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3613900Z     304.                     ORDER BY COALESCE(metadata.module_path, '') ASC,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3614236Z     305.                              identifier_prefix.dir_path ASC,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3614499Z     306.                              identifiers.filename ASC,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3614754Z     307.                              identifiers.identifier ASC
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3614984Z     308.                 """.trimIndent(),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3615204Z     309.                 fields = DeadCodeField.entries,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3615428Z     310.                 mapRow = {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3615641Z     311.                     DeadCodeCandidate(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3615905Z     312.                         identifier = string(DeadCodeField.IDENTIFIER),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3616227Z     313.                         path = path(DeadCodeField.DIR, DeadCodeField.FILENAME),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3616561Z     314.                         modulePath = nullableString(DeadCodeField.MODULE_PATH),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3617003Z     315.                         sourceSet = nullableString(DeadCodeField.SOURCE_SET),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3617346Z     316.                         packageName = nullableString(DeadCodeField.PACKAGE_NAME),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3617658Z     317.                         confidence = MetricsConfidence.LOW,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3618161Z     318.                         reason = "Identifier has no inbound reference rows matching its file and simple name; identifier_paths is lexical, not declaration-only.",
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3618625Z     319.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3618909Z     320.                 },
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3619081Z     321.             ),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3619242Z     322.         )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3619390Z     323. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3619529Z     324. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3619783Z     325.     fun changeImpactRadius(fqName: String, depth: Int): List<ChangeImpactNode> {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3620142Z     326.         require(depth >= 0) { "depth must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3620410Z     327.         if (depth == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3620640Z     328.         return readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3620851Z     329.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3621050Z     330.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3621473Z     331.                     WITH RECURSIVE impacted_files(depth, src_prefix_id, src_filename, via_target_fq_id) AS (
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3621882Z     332.                         SELECT 1, src_prefix_id, src_filename, target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3622165Z     333.                         FROM symbol_references
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3622473Z     334.                         WHERE target_fq_id = (SELECT fq_id FROM fq_names WHERE fq_name = ?)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3622767Z     335.                         UNION
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3622991Z     336.                         SELECT impacted_files.depth + 1,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3623251Z     337.                                refs.src_prefix_id,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3623493Z     338.                                refs.src_filename,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3623728Z     339.                                refs.target_fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3623965Z     340.                         FROM impacted_files
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3624204Z     341.                         JOIN symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3624482Z     342.                           ON refs.tgt_prefix_id = impacted_files.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3624798Z     343.                          AND refs.tgt_filename = impacted_files.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3625087Z     344.                         WHERE impacted_files.depth < ?
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3625320Z     345.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3625504Z     346.                     first_hits AS (
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3625769Z     347.                         SELECT src_prefix_id, src_filename, MIN(depth) AS depth
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3626050Z     348.                         FROM impacted_files
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3626295Z     349.                         GROUP BY src_prefix_id, src_filename
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3626527Z     350.                     )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3626644Z

2026-05-04T14:15:33.3677950Z     198.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3678118Z     199.             throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3678455Z     200.                 code = failure.code,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3678788Z     201.                 message = failure.message,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3679313Z     202.                 details = CliCommandCatalog.usageDetails(metadata.path) + failure.details,
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3679850Z     203.             )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3680080Z     204.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3680302Z     205.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3680536Z     206. 
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3680912Z     207.     private fun parseSkillCommand(parsed: ParsedArguments): CliCommand {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3681520Z     208.         val positionals = parsed.positionals
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3681864Z     209.         if (positionals.size < 2) {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3682262Z     210.             return CliCommand.Help(listOf("skill"))
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3682593Z     211.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3682882Z     212.         val wrapperCliName = positionals[1]
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3683356Z     213.         val wrapperName = SkillWrapperName.fromCliName(wrapperCliName)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3683802Z     214.             ?: throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3684145Z     215.                 code = "CLI_USAGE",
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3684551Z     216.                 message = "Unknown skill wrapper: $wrapperCliName. " +
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3685137Z     217.                     "Valid wrappers: ${SkillWrapperName.entries.joinToString { it.cliName }}",
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3685649Z     218.             )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3685934Z     219.         if (positionals.size < 3) {
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3686238Z     220.             throw CliFailure(
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3686516Z     221.                 code = "CLI_USAGE",
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3687006Z     222.                 message = "Skill wrapper '$wrapperCliName' requires a JSON argument (literal or file path)",
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3687500Z     223.             )
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3687730Z     224.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3687975Z     225.         val rawInput = positionals[2]
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3688403Z     226.         return CliCommand.Skill(name = wrapperName, rawInput = rawInput)
2026-05-04T14:15:33.3688829Z     227.     }

2026-05-04T14:15:45.5292248Z     396.     /**
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5292528Z     397.      * Fuzzy search the source index for symbol fully-qualified names that match [query].
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5292841Z     398.      *
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5293131Z     399.      * The matcher is case-insensitive and substring-based against `fq_names.fq_name`. Results
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5293577Z     400.      * are ordered so that exact matches and short, simple-name matches rank first; remaining
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5294045Z     401.      * matches are returned alphabetically. An empty or blank [query] returns the most-frequently
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5294400Z     402.      * referenced symbols up to [limit].
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5294608Z     403.      *
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5294887Z     404.      * Returns an empty list when the workspace has not been indexed yet or the schema is stale,
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5295268Z     405.      * mirroring the safe defaults used by the metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5295515Z     406.      */
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5295745Z     407.     fun searchSymbols(query: String, limit: Int = 25): List<String> {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5296076Z     408.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5296341Z     409.         if (limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5296580Z     410.         val trimmed = query.trim()
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5296827Z     411.         return readMetric(emptyList()) { conn ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5297212Z     412.             val sql = if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5297443Z     413.                 """
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5297639Z     414.                 SELECT names.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5297966Z     415.                 FROM fq_names names
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5298319Z     416.                 JOIN symbol_references refs ON refs.target_fq_id = names.fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5298614Z     417.                 GROUP BY names.fq_id
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5298854Z     418.                 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, names.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5299096Z     419.                 LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5299401Z     420.                 """.trimIndent()
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5299601Z     421.             } else {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5299781Z     422.                 """
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5299966Z     423.                 SELECT names.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5300178Z     424.                 FROM fq_names names
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5300430Z     425.                 WHERE LOWER(names.fq_name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\'
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5300670Z     426.                 ORDER BY
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5300856Z     427.                     CASE
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5301070Z     428.                         WHEN LOWER(names.fq_name) = ? THEN 0
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5301432Z     429.                         WHEN LOWER(names.fq_name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\' THEN 1
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5301736Z     430.                         WHEN LOWER(names.fq_name) LIKE ? ESCAPE '\' THEN 2
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5301986Z     431.                         ELSE 3
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5302177Z     432.                     END,
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5302387Z     433.                     LENGTH(names.fq_name) ASC,
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5302612Z     434.                     names.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5302814Z     435.                 LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5303000Z     436.                 """.trimIndent()
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5303190Z     437.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5303408Z     438.             conn.prepareStatement(sql).use { stmt ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5303665Z     439.                 if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5303896Z     440.                     stmt.setInt(1, limit)
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5304113Z     441.                 } else {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5304447Z     442.                     val needle = trimmed.lowercase().replace("\\", "\\\\").replace("%", "\\%").replace("_", "\\_")
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5304818Z     443.                     stmt.setString(1, "%$needle%")
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5305083Z     444.                     stmt.setString(2, trimmed.lowercase())
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5305348Z     445.                     stmt.setString(3, "%.$needle")
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5305597Z     446.                     stmt.setString(4, "$needle%")
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5305831Z     447.                     stmt.setInt(5, limit)
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5306041Z     448.                 }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5306242Z     449.                 stmt.executeQuery().use { rs ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5306470Z     450.                     buildList {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5306689Z     451.                         while (rs.next()) {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5306928Z     452.                             add(rs.getString(1))
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5307145Z     453.                         }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5307331Z     454.                     }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5307508Z     455.                 }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5307678Z     456.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5307840Z     457.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5307994Z     458.     }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5308145Z     459. 
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5308349Z     460.     fun graph(fqName: String, depth: Int): MetricsGraph {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5308651Z     461.         require(depth >= 0) { "depth must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5308887Z     462. 
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5309055Z     463.         val focal = fanInMetric(fqName)
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5309341Z     464.         val impact = changeImpactRadius(fqName = fqName, depth = depth)
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5309864Z     465.         val directReferences = impact.filter { it.depth == 1 && it.viaTargetFqName == fqName }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5310272Z     466.         val childIdsByParent = buildChildIdsByParent(focal, impact)
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5310604Z     467.         val impactBySourcePath = impact.groupBy { it.sourcePath }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5310876Z     468.         val nodes = buildList {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5311179Z     469.             add(focalSymbolNode(fqName, focal, directReferences, childIdsByParent))
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5311613Z     470.             focal?.targetPath?.let { targetPath ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5312002Z     471.                 add(targetFileNode(targetPath, focal, childIdsByParent))
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5312266Z     472.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5312492Z     473.             impactBySourcePath.forEach { (_, nodesForPath) ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5312804Z     474.                 val representative = nodesForPath.minBy { it.depth }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5313241Z     475.                 add(sourceFileNode(nodesForPath, childIdsByParent, parentIdFor(representative, impact, fqName)))
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5313697Z     476.                 nodesForPath.forEach { node -> add(referenceEdgeNode(node)) }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5314058Z     477.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5314295Z     478.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5314475Z     479.         val edges = buildList {
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5314704Z     480.             focal?.targetPath?.let { targetPath ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5314930Z     481.                 add(
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5315134Z     482.                     MetricsGraphEdge(
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5315385Z     483.                         from = fileNodeId(targetPath),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5315637Z     484.                         to = symbolNodeId(fqName),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5315902Z     485.                         edgeType = MetricsGraphEdgeType.CONTAINS,
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5316285Z     486.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5316541Z     487.                 )
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5316795Z     488.             }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5317107Z     489.             impactBySourcePath.forEach { (_, nodesForPath) ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5317419Z     490.                 val representative = nodesForPath.minBy { it.depth }
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5317679Z     491.                 add(
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5317870Z     492.                     MetricsGraphEdge(
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5318138Z     493.                         from = parentIdFor(representative, impact, fqName),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5318462Z     494.                         to = sourceFileNodeId(representative.sourcePath),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5318786Z     495.                         edgeType = MetricsGraphEdgeType.REFERENCED_BY,
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5319182Z     496.                         weight = nodesForPath.sumOf(ChangeImpactNode::occurrenceCount),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5319474Z     497.                     ),
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5319649Z     498.                 )
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5319861Z     499.                 nodesForPath.forEach { node ->
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5320093Z     500.                     add(
2026-05-04T14:15:45.5320390Z CompactionProcessor: Utilization 41.3% (52924/128000 tokens) below threshold 80%

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5402237Z     109.             moduleName = request.moduleName,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5402493Z     110.             includeFiles = request.includeFiles,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5402771Z     111.             maxFilesPerModule = request.maxFilesPerModule,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5403012Z     112.         )
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5403230Z     113.         val result = cliService.workspaceFiles(options, query)
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5403527Z     114.         return KastWorkspaceFilesSuccessResponse(

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5403968Z     116.             query = KastWorkspaceFilesQuery(

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5404463Z     118.                 moduleName = request.moduleName,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5404720Z     119.                 includeFiles = request.includeFiles,

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5405248Z     121.             ),

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5405724Z     123.             schemaVersion = result.payload.schemaVersion,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5405998Z     124.             logFile = SkillLogFile.placeholder(),

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5406365Z     126.     }

2026-05-04T14:15:56.5407153Z     131. 
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5407374Z     132.     private suspend fun executeDiagnostics(rawJson: String): Any {
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5407734Z     133.         val request = json.decodeFromString<KastDiagnosticsRequest>(rawJson)
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5408102Z     134.         val workspaceRoot = requireWorkspaceRoot(request.workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5408423Z     135.         val options = runtimeOptionsFor(workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5408713Z     136.         val filePaths = request.filePaths.map { path ->
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5409010Z     137.             Path.of(path).toAbsolutePath().normalize().toString()
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5409259Z     138.         }
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5409605Z     139.         val diagnosticsResult = cliService.diagnostics(options, DiagnosticsQuery(filePaths = filePaths)).payload
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5410210Z     140.         return KastDiagnosticsSuccessResponse(
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5410445Z     141.             ok = true,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5410647Z     142.             query = KastDiagnosticsQuery(
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5410887Z     143.                 workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot,
2026-05-04T14:15:56.5411124Z     144.                 filePaths = request.filePaths,

2026-05-04T14:16:12.8240361Z     385.     private suspend fun executeRenameByOffset(request: KastRenameByOffsetRequest): Any {
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8241250Z     386.         val workspaceRoot = requireWorkspaceRoot(request.workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8241953Z     387.         val options = runtimeOptionsFor(workspaceRoot)
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8242530Z     388.         val filePath = Path.of(request.filePath).toAbsolutePath().normalize().toString()
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8243007Z     389. 
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8243253Z     390.         return performRename(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8243558Z     391.             options = options,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8243858Z     392.             filePath = filePath,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8244182Z     393.             offset = request.offset,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8244514Z     394.             newName = request.newName,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8244822Z     395.             queryBuilder = {
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8245147Z     396.                 KastRenameByOffsetQuery(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8245525Z     397.                     workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8245890Z     398.                     filePath = filePath,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8246217Z     399.                     offset = request.offset,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8246571Z     400.                     newName = request.newName,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8246867Z     401.                 )
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8247104Z     402.             },
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8247368Z     403.             failureQueryBuilder = {
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8247696Z     404.                 KastRenameFailureQuery(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8248054Z     405.                     workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot,

2026-05-04T14:16:12.8249447Z     409.                 )

2026-05-04T14:16:12.8250363Z     413. 
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8250616Z     414.     private suspend fun performRename(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8250983Z     415.         options: RuntimeCommandOptions,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8251543Z     416.         filePath: String,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8251843Z     417.         offset: Int,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8252112Z     418.         newName: String,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8252437Z     419.         queryBuilder: () -> KastRenameQuery,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8252855Z     420.         failureQueryBuilder: () -> KastRenameFailureQuery,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8253227Z     421.     ): Any {
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8253490Z     422.         // Dry-run rename to get edits
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8253859Z     423.         val renameResult = cliService.rename(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8254205Z     424.             options,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8254476Z     425.             RenameQuery(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8254890Z     426.                 position = FilePosition(filePath = filePath, offset = offset),
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8255351Z     427.                 newName = newName,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8255665Z     428.                 dryRun = true,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8255979Z     429.             ),
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8256219Z     430.         ).payload
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8256463Z     431. 
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8256688Z     432.         // Apply the edits
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8257225Z     433.         val applyResult = cliService.applyEdits(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8257574Z     434.             options,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8257851Z     435.             ApplyEditsQuery(
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8258184Z     436.                 edits = renameResult.edits,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8258563Z     437.                 fileHashes = renameResult.fileHashes,
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8258904Z     438.             ),
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8259139Z     439.         ).payload
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8259381Z     440. 
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8259631Z     441.         // Run diagnostics on affected files
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8260179Z     442.         val affectedFiles = renameResult.affectedFiles
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8260660Z     443.         val diagnosticsPayload = if (affectedFiles.isNotEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8261455Z     444.             cliService.diagnostics(options, DiagnosticsQuery(filePaths = affectedFiles)).payload
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8262019Z     445.         } else {
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8262280Z     446.             null
2026-05-04T14:16:12.8262533Z     447.         }

2026-05-04T14:16:20.9957026Z     186. 
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9957202Z     187.     private fun <T> withContextClassLoader(
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9957438Z     188.         classLoader: ClassLoader,
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9957646Z     189.         block: () -> T,
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9957825Z     190.     ): T {
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9958006Z     191.         val thread = Thread.currentThread()
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9958412Z     192.         val previous = thread.contextClassLoader
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9958679Z     193.         thread.contextClassLoader = classLoader
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9958905Z     194.         return try {
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9959090Z     195.             block()
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9959272Z     196.         } finally {
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9959477Z     197.             thread.contextClassLoader = previous
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9959700Z     198.         }
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9959849Z     199.     }
2026-05-04T14:16:20.9959993Z     200.

2026-05-04T14:16:46.3067179Z     243.     @Test
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3067491Z     244.     fun `moduleDepthMetrics classifies deep module`() {
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3067960Z     245.         val root = workspaceRoot.toAbsolutePath().normalize()
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3068636Z     246.         SqliteSourceIndexStore(root).use { store ->
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3069023Z     247.             store.ensureSchema()
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3069359Z     248.             store.saveFullIndex(
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3069683Z     249.                 updates = listOf(
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3070340Z     250.                     fileUpdate("/deep/A.kt", identifiers = setOf("A"), packageName = "deep", modulePath = ":deep", sourceSet = "main"),
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3071468Z     251.                     fileUpdate("/deep/B.kt", identifiers = setOf("B"), packageName = "deep", modulePath = ":deep", sourceSet = "main"),
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3072092Z     252.                 ),
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3072504Z     253.                 manifest = mapOf("/deep/A.kt" to 1L, "/deep/B.kt" to 1L),
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3072898Z     254.             )
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3073165Z     255.             repeat(4) { index ->
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3073689Z     256.                 store.upsertSymbolReference("/deep/A.kt", 10 + index, "deep.B", "/deep/B.kt", 1)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3074431Z     257.                 store.upsertSymbolReference("/deep/B.kt", 20 + index, "deep.A", "/deep/A.kt", 1)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3074956Z     258.             }
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3075191Z     259.         }
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3075417Z     260. 
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3075690Z     261.         MetricsEngine(root).use { metrics ->
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3076116Z     262.             val depth = metrics.moduleDepthMetrics().single()
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3076493Z     263. 
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3076767Z     264.             assertEquals(":deep", depth.modulePath)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3077173Z     265.             assertEquals(2, depth.fileCount)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3077581Z     266.             assertEquals(2, depth.declaredSymbolCount)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3078007Z     267.             assertEquals(8, depth.internalRefCount)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3078436Z     268.             assertEquals(0, depth.externalRefCount)
2026-05-04T14:16:46.3078843Z     269.             assertEquals(1.0, depth.cohesionRatio)

2026-05-04T14:18:45.6786726Z       /**
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6786930Z        * Generic file-path filter for metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6787174Z        *
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6787434Z        * [fileGlob] is a glob pattern applied to the full file path (e.g. `**/*Test.kt`).
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6787866Z        * [folderPrefix] is a path prefix filter - only files whose path starts with this
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6788226Z        * prefix are included (e.g. `/src/main/kotlin`).
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6788449Z        *
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6788835Z        * Both filters are combined with AND semantics when both are non-null.
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6789100Z        */
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6789256Z       data class FileFilterSpec(
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6789456Z           val fileGlob: String? = null,
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6789673Z           val folderPrefix: String? = null,
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6789874Z       ) {
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6790032Z           private val globMatcher by lazy {
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6790242Z               fileGlob?.let {
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6790660Z                   val pattern = if (it.startsWith("glob:") || it.startsWith("regex:")) it else "glob:$it"
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6791176Z                   FileSystems.getDefault().getPathMatcher(pattern)
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6791695Z               }
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6791931Z           }
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6792121Z       
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6792341Z           /** Returns true if [path] passes all configured filters. */
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6792613Z           fun matches(path: String?): Boolean {
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6792845Z               if (path == null) return false
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6793051Z               if (folderPrefix != null) {
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6793380Z                   val normalised = if (folderPrefix.endsWith("/")) folderPrefix else "$folderPrefix/"
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6793786Z                   if (!path.startsWith(normalised) && path != folderPrefix) return false
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6794061Z               }
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6794224Z               if (globMatcher != null) {
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6794461Z                   val filePath = java.nio.file.Path.of(path)
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6794733Z                   if (!globMatcher!!.matches(filePath)) return false
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6794966Z               }
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6795118Z               return true
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6795281Z           }
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6795420Z       
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6795641Z           val isEmpty: Boolean get() = fileGlob == null && folderPrefix == null
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6795911Z       }
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6796046Z       
2026-05-04T14:18:45.6796337Z       /** Filters a list retaining only items where [pathExtractor] returns a path that passes [filter]. */

2026-05-04T14:18:45.6797304Z           if (filter.isEmpty) this else filter { item -> filter.matches(pathExtractor(item)) }

2026-05-04T14:20:04.4809325Z     117.     fun moduleCouplingMatrix(): List<ModuleCouplingMetric> =
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4809595Z     118.         readMetricRows(
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4809792Z     119.             MetricQuerySpec(
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4809989Z     120.                 sql = """
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4810252Z     121.                     SELECT source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4810573Z     122.                            target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set,
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4811016Z     123.                            COUNT(*) AS reference_count
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4811438Z     124.                     FROM symbol_references refs
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4811703Z     125.                     JOIN file_metadata source_meta
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4811991Z     126.                       ON source_meta.prefix_id = refs.src_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4812298Z     127.                      AND source_meta.filename = refs.src_filename
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4812570Z     128.                     JOIN file_metadata target_meta
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4812832Z     129.                       ON target_meta.prefix_id = refs.tgt_prefix_id
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4813138Z     130.                      AND target_meta.filename = refs.tgt_filename
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4813439Z     131.                     WHERE source_meta.module_path IS NOT NULL
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4813714Z     132.                       AND target_meta.module_path IS NOT NULL
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4814014Z     133.                       AND source_meta.module_path <> target_meta.module_path
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4814468Z     134.                     GROUP BY source_meta.module_path, source_meta.source_set, target_meta.module_path, target_meta.source_set
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4814994Z     135.                     ORDER BY reference_count DESC, source_meta.module_path ASC, target_meta.module_path ASC
2026-05-04T14:20:04.4815346Z     136.                 """.trimIndent(),

2026-05-04T14:20:27.5590261Z     195.     fun moduleCycles(): List<ModuleCycleMetric> {
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5590657Z     196.         val edgeWeights = moduleCouplingMatrix()
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5591105Z     197.             .fold(mutableMapOf<Pair<String, String>, Int>()) { weights, edge ->
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5591802Z     198.                 val key = edge.sourceModulePath to edge.targetModulePath
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5592286Z     199.                 weights[key] = weights.getOrDefault(key, 0) + edge.referenceCount
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5592684Z     200.                 weights
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5592936Z     201.             }
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5593231Z     202.         val adjacency = buildMap<String, List<String>> {
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5593796Z     203.             val nodes = edgeWeights.keys.flatMap { (source, target) -> listOf(source, target) }.toSortedSet()
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5594360Z     204.             nodes.forEach { node ->
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5594638Z     205.                 put(
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5594902Z     206.                     node,
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5595271Z     207.                     edgeWeights.keys
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5595619Z     208.                         .filter { (source, _) -> source == node }
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5595901Z     209.                         .map { (_, target) -> target }
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5596135Z     210.                         .sorted(),
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5596341Z     211.                 )
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5596523Z     212.             }
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5596705Z     213.         }
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5596876Z     214. 
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5597108Z     215.         return stronglyConnectedComponents(adjacency)
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5597379Z     216.             .filter { it.size > 1 }
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5597629Z     217.             .mapNotNull { component ->
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5597896Z     218.                 shortestCycle(component, adjacency)?.let { cycle ->
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5598203Z     219.                     val cycleEdges = cycle.zipWithNext()
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5598528Z     220.                     val totalReferenceCount = cycleEdges.sumOf { (source, target) ->
2026-05-04T14:20:27.5598939Z CompactionProcessor: Utilization 71.7% (91792/128000 tokens) below threshold 80%

2026-05-04T14:20:49.8175295Z     396.     /**
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8175734Z     397.      * Fuzzy search the source index for symbol fully-qualified names that match [query].
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8176135Z     398.      *
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8176640Z     399.      * The matcher is case-insensitive and substring-based against `fq_names.fq_name`. Results
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8177290Z     400.      * are ordered so that exact matches and short, simple-name matches rank first; remaining
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8177941Z     401.      * matches are returned alphabetically. An empty or blank [query] returns the most-frequently
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8178414Z     402.      * referenced symbols up to [limit].
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8178777Z     403.      *
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8179578Z     404.      * Returns an empty list when the workspace has not been indexed yet or the schema is stale,
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8180286Z     405.      * mirroring the safe defaults used by the metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8180697Z     406.      */
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8181043Z     407.     fun searchSymbols(query: String, limit: Int = 25): List<String> {
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8181693Z     408.         require(limit >= 0) { "limit must be non-negative" }
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8182063Z     409.         if (limit == 0) return emptyList()
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8182387Z     410.         val trimmed = query.trim()
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8182780Z     411.         return readMetric(emptyList()) { conn ->
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8183175Z     412.             val sql = if (trimmed.isEmpty()) {
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8183543Z     413.                 """
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8183839Z     414.                 SELECT names.fq_name
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8184177Z     415.                 FROM fq_names names
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8184627Z     416.                 JOIN symbol_references refs ON refs.target_fq_id = names.fq_id
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8185104Z     417.                 GROUP BY names.fq_id
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8185497Z     418.                 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, names.fq_name ASC
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8185876Z     419.                 LIMIT ?
2026-05-04T14:20:49.8186172Z     420.                 """.trimIndent()

2026-05-04T14:25:15.4708524Z 
2026-05-04T14:25:15.4717752Z Ah, I see the issue now—the backtick at position 73 is part of the inline code example `` `**/*Test.kt` ``. The problem is that `**/*Test.kt` contains `/*`, which Kotlin interprets as the start of a nested block comment inside the KDoc. That's why the parser is getting confused and throwing a syntax error. I'm considering different ways to fix this—I could use HTML entities like `&#42;` for the asterisk or `&#47;` for the slash to break up the problematic `*/` sequence, or I could just restructure the example to avoid the pattern altogether, maybe something like referencing `all-Test.kt` files instead. `**Test.kt` as the simpler glob pattern to avoid the `*/` sequence that breaks the kdoc formatting.

2026-05-04T14:27:30.5516659Z copilot: Now I understand the structure. The generated YAML will include `fileGlob` and `folderFilter` as nullable string properties in both `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`. I need to understand how the schema generator renders these nullable fields.
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5517740Z 
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5518304Z Looking at the existing YAML for `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`, nullable string fields like `symbol` and `workspaceRoot` are rendered as:
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5519008Z ```yaml
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5519205Z symbol:
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5519402Z   anyOf:
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5519587Z     -
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5519800Z       type: string
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5520028Z     -
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5520220Z       type: null
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5520423Z ```
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5520531Z 
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5520788Z So `fileGlob` and `folderFilter` (both `String? = null`) should be rendered similarly. 
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5521216Z 
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5526767Z Since they're nullable and optional, they won't appear in the `required` list. Rather than manually updating the YAML, I should just run the test to see what gets generated—the test failure will show me the actual output I need to match against. I need to verify how fields with default values are handled in the YAML schema—specifically whether they appear in the `required` list. Looking at `limit` and `depth`, which both have default values, I can see they're typed as integers but not included in the required fields, so I should follow that same pattern when adding the new nullable string fields.
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5529240Z 
2026-05-04T14:27:30.5530023Z Rather than guessing at the correct ordering and structure, I should actually generate the YAML to see what the output looks like. I'll check if there's a Gradle task or test I can run to generate the schema directly.

2026-05-04T14:30:46.9520214Z       ## Summary
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9520436Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9520691Z       Six grouped changes to the kast codebase:
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9521027Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9521741Z       ### 1. Remove git hash from workspace DB path
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9523417Z       `WorkspaceDirectoryResolver.kt`: removed the `.resolve(workspaceHash(normalizedRoot))` call from the git-remote branch so workspace databases are stored at predictable, human-readable paths (e.g. `workspaces/github.com/amichne/kast`) instead of `workspaces/github.com/amichne/kast/<hash>`.
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9524759Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9525049Z       ### 2. Default `--workspace-root` to current working directory
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9526235Z       `CliCommandParser.requireWorkspaceRootPath()`: instead of throwing a `CliFailure` when `--workspace-root` is omitted, it now defaults to `System.getProperty("user.dir", ".")`. This is the expected default for most invocations.
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9527384Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9527597Z       ### 3. New `FileFilterSpec` class
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9528620Z       `index-store/src/main/kotlin/.../FileFilterSpec.kt`: a new data class that encapsulates `fileGlob: String?` and `folderPrefix: String?` for path-based filtering. Includes a `filterByPath<T>` extension function that short-circuits when the filter is empty.
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9529600Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9529865Z       ### 4. Thread `FileFilterSpec` through `MetricsEngine`
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9530881Z       All filterable methods (`fanInRanking`, `fanOutRanking`, `lowUsageSymbols`, `deadCodeCandidates`, `changeImpactRadius`) gain a `filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec()` parameter and apply `.filterByPath(filter)` to their result lists.
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9532229Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9532505Z       ### 5. Expose filtering through CLI and wrapper contracts
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9532957Z       - `CliCommand.Metrics`: adds `fileGlob: String?` and `folderFilter: String?`
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9533637Z       - `CliCommandParser`: parses `--file-glob` and `--folder` options for all filterable metrics subcommands
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9534427Z       - `WrapperContracts`: adds `fileGlob` and `folderFilter` to both `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9535241Z       - `SkillWrapperExecutor` and `CliExecution`: build a `FileFilterSpec` from these fields and pass it to the engine
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9535791Z       
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9536025Z       ### 6. Regenerated OpenAPI snapshot
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9536782Z       `wrapper-openapi.yaml` regenerated via `:kast-cli:generateWrapperOpenApiSchema` to reflect the new fields in `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`.
2026-05-04T14:30:46.9537457Z

2026-05-04T14:32:22.0327991Z     description: |
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0328228Z       ## Summary
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0328434Z       
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0329016Z       Six grouped changes to the kast codebase to improve ergonomics and add path-based filtering to all filterable metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0329648Z       
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0329840Z       ## Changes
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0330035Z       
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0330282Z       ### 1. Remove git hash from workspace DB path
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0331763Z       `WorkspaceDirectoryResolver.kt`: removed the `.resolve(workspaceHash(normalizedRoot))` call from the git-remote branch so workspace databases are stored at predictable, human-readable paths (e.g. `workspaces/github.com/amichne/kast`) instead of `workspaces/github.com/amichne/kast/<hash>`.
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0333077Z       
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0333391Z       ### 2. Default `--workspace-root` to current working directory
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0334571Z       `CliCommandParser.requireWorkspaceRootPath()`: instead of throwing a `CliFailure` when `--workspace-root` is omitted, it now defaults to `System.getProperty("user.dir", ".")`. This is the expected default for most invocations where kast is run from within the project root.
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0335648Z       
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0335873Z       ### 3. New `FileFilterSpec` class
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0337215Z       `index-store/src/main/kotlin/.../FileFilterSpec.kt`: a new data class that encapsulates `fileGlob: String?` and `folderPrefix: String?` for path-based filtering. A `lazy`-initialized `PathMatcher` avoids repeated pattern compilation. The companion `filterByPath<T>` extension function short-circuits (returns `this`) when the filter is empty.
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0338475Z       
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0338690Z       ### 4. Thread `FileFilterSpec` through `MetricsEngine`
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0339335Z       All filterable methods gain a `filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec()` parameter (default = no-op) and apply `.filterByPath(filter)` to their result lists:
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0340168Z       - `fanInRanking` — filters on `targetPath`
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0340488Z       - `fanOutRanking` — filters on `sourcePath`
2026-05-04T14:32:22.0340816Z       - `lowUsageSymbols` — filters on `targetPath`

2026-05-04T14:37:00.6552288Z     description: |
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6552788Z       ## Summary
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6553005Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6553577Z       Six grouped changes to the kast codebase to improve ergonomics and add path-based filtering to all filterable metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6554232Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6554433Z       ## Changes
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6554648Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6554892Z       ### 1. Remove git hash from workspace DB path
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6556268Z       `WorkspaceDirectoryResolver.kt`: removed the `.resolve(workspaceHash(normalizedRoot))` call from the git-remote branch so workspace databases are stored at predictable, human-readable paths (e.g. `workspaces/github.com/amichne/kast`) instead of `workspaces/github.com/amichne/kast/<hash>`.
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6557345Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6557548Z       ### 2. Default `--workspace-root` to current working directory
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6558708Z       `CliCommandParser.requireWorkspaceRootPath()`: instead of throwing a `CliFailure` when `--workspace-root` is omitted, it now defaults to `System.getProperty("user.dir", ".")`. This is the expected default for most invocations where kast is run from within the project root.
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6559839Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6560071Z       ### 3. New `FileFilterSpec` class
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6561705Z       `index-store/src/main/kotlin/.../FileFilterSpec.kt`: a new data class with `fileGlob: String?` and `folderPrefix: String?` for path-based filtering. Uses a `lazy`-initialized `PathMatcher` to avoid recompiling the glob pattern per call. The companion `filterByPath<T>` extension short-circuits when the filter is empty (no-op).
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6563148Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6563453Z       ### 4. Thread `FileFilterSpec` through `MetricsEngine`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6572877Z       All filterable methods gain a `filter: FileFilterSpec = FileFilterSpec()` default-no-op parameter and apply `.filterByPath(filter)` to their result lists:
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6573978Z       - `fanInRanking` — filters on `targetPath`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6574459Z       - `fanOutRanking` — filters on `sourcePath`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6574909Z       - `lowUsageSymbols` — filters on `targetPath`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6575358Z       - `deadCodeCandidates` — filters on `path`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6575817Z       - `changeImpactRadius` — filters on `sourcePath`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6576167Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6576473Z       ### 5. Expose filtering through CLI and wrapper contracts
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6577018Z       - `CliCommand.Metrics`: adds `fileGlob: String?` and `folderFilter: String?`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6577825Z       - `CliCommandParser`: parses `--file-glob` and `--folder` options for filterable metrics subcommands (fan-in, fan-out, low-usage, dead-code, impact)
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6578767Z       - `WrapperContracts`: adds `fileGlob` and `folderFilter` to both `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6579635Z       - `SkillWrapperExecutor` and `CliExecution`: build a `FileFilterSpec` and pass it to all applicable engine calls; the `KastMetricsQuery` also echoes back the filter fields in the response
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6580183Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6580349Z       ### 6. Regenerated OpenAPI snapshot
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6580933Z       `wrapper-openapi.yaml` regenerated via `:kast-cli:generateWrapperOpenApiSchema` to reflect the new `fileGlob` and `folderFilter` fields in `KastMetricsRequest` and `KastMetricsQuery`.
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6581722Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6581869Z       ## Tests
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6582115Z       - `KastConfigTest`: updated workspace path assertion (no hash segment)
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6582776Z       - `CliCommandParserTest`: replaced `metrics fails without workspace-root` (now invalid) with `metrics fan-in defaults workspace root to current working directory when not provided`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6583505Z       - `MetricsEngineTest`: 4 new filter tests (fanIn/fanOut by folder prefix, fanIn by glob, deadCode by folder prefix)
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6584277Z       - `FileFilterSpecTest`: 8 new unit tests covering empty filter, folderPrefix, fileGlob, AND semantics, and `filterByPath`
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6584677Z       
2026-05-04T14:37:00.6584829Z       All 228+ tests pass.

2026-05-04T14:38:08.0753513Z copilot: The MCP server is Playwright, not a git/push server. The push mechanism must be done differently.
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0753804Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0754132Z Let me think about this differently. Looking at the Copilot SWE agent in GitHub Actions, there's a well-known approach where:
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0754501Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0754589Z 1. The Copilot agent runs in a workflow
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0754920Z 2. The workflow has a `GITHUB_TOKEN` with only read permissions (as we see)
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0755242Z 3. The agent makes commits
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0755698Z 4. When the session ends (or when `create_pull_request` is called), the Copilot backend pushes the commits using its own service account token
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0756110Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0756305Z The `create_pull_request` tool probably sends a request to the Copilot backend API which then:
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0756662Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0756665Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0756733Z 1. Gets the local commits 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0756950Z 2. Pushes them to GitHub using its service account
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0757173Z 3. Creates the PR
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0757334Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0758664Z But currently the tool is returning "No commits between main and copilot/update-metrics-file-filtering" - which means the Copilot API is checking the GitHub API directly and finding no commits remotely. This suggests the Copilot backend pushes commits at the end of the session, so calling `create_pull_request` earlier doesn't work well. I should just finalize the task and let the session end naturally so the runtime can push the commits and create the PR.
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0759969Z 
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0761139Z Looking back at the `create_pull_request` tool description, it says it's safe to call even if a PR already exists, but the error is definitive - the remote branch genuinely has no new commits compared to main. Since my token only has `contents:read` and `pull_requests:read` permissions, I can't push or create PRs directly during the session anyway. The Copilot infrastructure must handle this automatically when the session ends.

2026-05-04T14:38:08.0874289Z       ### 3. Add FileFilterSpec to index-store module
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0874504Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0874806Z       Create a new file `index-store/src/main/kotlin/io/github/amichne/kast/indexstore/FileFilterSpec.kt`:
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0875150Z       ```kotlin
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0875330Z       package io.github.amichne.kast.indexstore
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0875542Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0875695Z       import java.nio.file.FileSystems
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0875890Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0876020Z       /**
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0876200Z        * Generic file-path filter for metrics queries.
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0876418Z        *
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0876663Z        * [fileGlob] is a glob pattern applied to the full file path (e.g. `**/*Test.kt`).
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0877063Z        * [folderPrefix] is a path prefix filter - only files whose path starts with this
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0877392Z        * prefix are included (e.g. `/src/main/kotlin`).
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0877611Z        *
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0877959Z        * Both filters are combined with AND semantics when both are non-null.
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0878233Z        */
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0878386Z       data class FileFilterSpec(
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0878589Z           val fileGlob: String? = null,
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0878803Z           val folderPrefix: String? = null,
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0878998Z       ) {
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0879150Z           private val globMatcher by lazy {
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0879365Z               fileGlob?.let {
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0879670Z                   val pattern = if (it.startsWith("glob:") || it.startsWith("regex:")) it else "glob:$it"
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0880143Z                   FileSystems.getDefault().getPathMatcher(pattern)
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0880381Z               }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0880531Z           }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0880668Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0880866Z           /** Returns true if [path] passes all configured filters. */
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0881133Z           fun matches(path: String?): Boolean {
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0881526Z               if (path == null) return false
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0881844Z               if (folderPrefix != null) {
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0882334Z                   val normalised = if (folderPrefix.endsWith("/")) folderPrefix else "$folderPrefix/"
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0882979Z                   if (!path.startsWith(normalised) && path != folderPrefix) return false
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0883344Z               }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0883504Z               if (globMatcher != null) {
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0883744Z                   val filePath = java.nio.file.Path.of(path)
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0884024Z                   if (!globMatcher!!.matches(filePath)) return false
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0884253Z               }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0884406Z               return true
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0884577Z           }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0884717Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0884942Z           val isEmpty: Boolean get() = fileGlob == null && folderPrefix == null
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0885209Z       }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0885344Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0885640Z       /** Filters a list retaining only items where [pathExtractor] returns a path that passes [filter]. */
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0886128Z       fun <T> List<T>.filterByPath(filter: FileFilterSpec, pathExtractor: (T) -> String?): List<T> =
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0886568Z           if (filter.isEmpty) this else filter { item -> filter.matches(pathExtractor(item)) }
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0886936Z       ```
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0887108Z       
2026-05-04T14:38:08.0887515Z       Then create tests `index-store/src/test/kotlin/io/github/amichne/kast/indexstore/FileFilterSpecTest.kt`:
